title: Arduino input output device and 2x LED's
Virtual Bookkeeper
description:
Company: Naples Group

Location: Remote (U.S. based)

Employment Type: Full-Time | 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Eastern Time)



Naples Group is seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Bookkeeper to manage the financial records for all of our entities under the Naples umbrella, which include a real estate brokerage, rental properties under management, construction projects (fix & flip) and also a dumpster rental company. This role is ideal for someone who is organized, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, multi-entity environment.



Responsibilities:

Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records for four related companies

Record all transactions including income, expenses, payroll, and transfers

Reconcile bank and credit card statements monthly

Manage accounts payable and receivable

Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports

Track budgets and flag discrepancies or unusual activity

Assist with tax preparation and provide documentation to CPA/accountant

Maintain organized digital records and support audits if needed

Communicate with management regarding financial performance and issues



Required Skills & Qualifications:

5+ years of book keeping experience 

Previous experience working with real estate/property management/waste management companies in the US 

Proven experience as a bookkeeper or in a similar accounting role

Proficiency in QuickBooks

Strong skills in Excel and Google Sheets

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to manage multiple entities and accounts

Strong organizational and time management skills

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills



Ability to work 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Time



Preferred (but not required)

Experience with real estate, dumpster, brokerage, or multi-entity businesses

Familiarity with payroll, 1099s, and tax documentation

Experience working with CPAs and financial advisors

What We Offer

Competitive hourly wage or salary (based on experience) 

Full-time position

Supportive and professional team environment

Opportunity to grow with a fast-expanding real estate company

To apply:

Please submit your resume and a brief summary of your bookkeeping experience and why you would be a great fit for Naples Group.

title: Senior Property Accountant (AU/NZ Experience)
description:
Job Brief: Xero Certified Specialist / Cloud Accountant

1. Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Xero Specialist based in the Philippines to manage the financial operations for a New Zealand-based property investment and short-term rental business (Palmy Stays). The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in Xero, New Zealand GST requirements, and integrating third-party property management or payroll applications.



2. Key Responsibilities

Xero Management: Full-cycle bookkeeping, including bank reconciliation, accounts payable/receivable, and fixed asset tracking for a portfolio of ~8 properties.



Property Integration: Manage the flow of data between our Property Management System (PMS) and Xero to ensure accurate booking income and expense tracking.



NZ Compliance: Prepare monthly/bi-monthly GST returns and ensure all coding aligns with New Zealand IRD standards.



Payroll Administration: Manage staff payroll using localized Philippine software (e.g., Hurey, PaySauce, or Employment Hero) and ensure seamless synchronization with Xero.



Reporting: Generate monthly Profit & Loss statements per property to track ROI and maintenance costs.



3. Required Qualifications

Certified Xero Advisor: Must have an active Xero certification.



NZ Accounting Experience: Proven track record working with New Zealand businesses, specifically regarding GST and the "Chart of Accounts" for property rentals.



Tech Stack Proficiency: Experience with:



Xero (Core accounting)



Hubdoc or Dext (Receipt processing)



Property Management Systems (e.g., Guesty, Hospitable, or Landlord Studio)



Stripe/Xero Integration for automated payments.



Communication: Exceptional English verbal and written skills for drafting professional communications and coordinating with NZ-based accountants.



4. Technical Environment

Our business operates on a high-end digital stack. You will be expected to utilize:



Xero integrated with Stripe.



Mesh Wi-Fi/Cloud-based tools for real-time collaboration.



AI Productivity tools (Gemini/ChatGPT) for workflow optimization.

title: Lead staff accountant
description:
About the Role



We are seeking a detail-oriented, proactive, and experienced Lead Staff Accountant to oversee our accounting operations and drive financial accuracy, compliance, and process efficiency across the organization.



This role is ideal for someone who has strong technical accounting knowledge, hands-on experience in accounts receivable, payroll, month-end close, and financial reporting, and the leadership skills to manage and mentor a growing accounting team.



As the Lead Staff Accountant, you will play a critical role in maintaining the company’s financial health, improving workflows, and ensuring compliance with financial and regulatory requirements.



Key Responsibilities



I. Financial Reporting & Month-End Close

- Lead and execute monthly and year-end closing processes

- Prepare accurate and timely financial statements and internal reporting packages

- Ensure all financial records are maintained in accordance with accounting standards and company policies

- Review general ledger activity and supporting schedules for accuracy and completeness

- Assist in analyzing financial results and identifying variances or discrepancies



II. Team Leadership & Oversight

- Lead and manage the Accounting team, including payroll and billing functions

- Supervise, mentor, and support tea
mbers to ensure accuracy, efficiency, and accountability

- Provide guidance, training, and ongoing support to improve team performance and development

- Help establish and maintain clear accounting procedures and internal controls



III. Process Improvement & Automation

- Identify opportunities to improve accounting processes for greater efficiency and accuracy

- Lead initiatives focused on automation and workflow optimization

- Reduce manual work by improving systems, reporting tools, and recurring accounting procedures

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve financial and operational processes



IV. Regulatory Compliance & Third-Party Coordination

- Manage communications with regulatory agencies, legal entities, external vendors, and third parties

- Ensure compliance with tax laws, labor regulations, and financial reporting requirements

- Stay updated on changes in accounting, payroll, and regulatory requirements

- Implement necessary adjustments to keep company processes compliant and current



V. Accounts Receivable (AR) Management

- Generate, issue, and monitor customer invoices

- Track collections and ensure timely payment from customers

- Reconcile customer accounts and resolve billing discrepancies promptly

- Maintain complete and accurate records of all AR transactions

- Collaborate with internal teams to address payment delays or customer account concerns

- Monitor and manage AR aging reports

- Identify and implement process improvements within the AR function



VI. Payroll Management

- Process and manage weekly and bi-weekly payroll

- Calculate wages, overtime, bonuses, deductions, and taxes accurately

- Maintain up-to-date employee payroll records, including compensation and tax information

- Ensure payroll compliance with tax laws, labor regulations, and internal company policies

- Respond to employee payroll inquiries and resolve discrepancies in a timely manner

- Work closely with HR and Finance to ensure payroll accuracy and completeness

- Prepare payroll reports, summaries, and supporting documentation

- Stay current on payroll-related legal and compliance updates

- Identify and implement payroll process improvements for better efficiency and accuracy



Qualifications



- Proven experience in accounting, accounts receivable, payroll processing, and financial reporting

- Strong understanding of accounting principles, payroll procedures, and financial controls

- Experience leading or supervising an accounting, payroll, or billing team is highly preferred

- Proficiency in accounting and payroll platforms such as QuickBooks, Wise, or similar systems

- Advanced working knowledge of Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets

- Strong analytical, organizational, and time management skills

- Ability to manage multiple deadlines and prioritize effectively

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills

- Familiarity with labor laws, tax regulations, and payroll compliance requirements

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field preferred
salary: Will be discussed after the interview

title: B2B Sales Development Representative (US Market) – Offshore Staffing Company
description:
We are a fast-growing offshore staffing company serving US-based businesses. We build structured offshore teams across recruiting, HR, accounting, and administrative functions for distributed organizations.



We are hiring an experienced Sales Development Representative (SDR) based in the Philippines to drive outbound prospecting and generate qualified meetings with US decision-makers.



This is a performance-driven role with strong commission upside.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Researching and identifying qualified US-based companies

Building targeted prospect lists

Executing cold
 and LinkedIn outreach campaigns

Personalizing messaging for decision-makers (COO, VP Operations, HR, Founders)

Booking qualified meetings for the founder

Managing outreach sequences using modern sales tools

Tracking pipeline activity in CRM

Continuously improving messaging and conversion rates

You will NOT be responsible for closing deals — your focus is qualified meeting generation.



Required Experience (Must Have)

3+ years B2B sales experience

Experience selling to US-based companies

Experience with cold
 and LinkedIn outbound

Experience using tools like Apollo, Instantly, Lemlist, Smartlead, Clay, or similar

Strong written English (professional, executive tone)

Experience booking meetings for founders or executives

Ability to research companies and personalize outreach



Bonus if you have:

Experience selling staffing, BPO, outsourcing, or recruitment services

Experience using AI tools to enhance outbound (ChatGPT, Clay AI enrichment, AI personalization tools)

Experience targeting mid-market companies



What We’re Looking For

Highly proactive and self-directed

Process-driven and organized

Comfortable testing messaging and iterating

Able to think strategically about target markets

Strong research skills

Performance-oriented



This is not an entry-level role. We are looking for someone who understands outbound strategy and knows how to get responses from US executives.



Tools & Technology

You should be comfortable working with:

Sales Navigator

Apollo / similar data tools

Cold
 platforms

CRM systems

AI writing tools for personalization

Google Workspace

If you have built or optimized outbound systems before, that is a strong advantage.



Compensation

Base: $600–$800 USD per month depending on experience PLUS commission!

Commission: Competitive performance-based commission per qualified meeting and per deal closed

Opportunity to grow into a larger sales role over time

High performers can significantly increase earnings through commission.



To Apply Please include:



A brief summary of your B2B outbound experience

Tools you’ve used for cold
 and prospecting

Example of a cold
 you’ve written to a US executive

Only applicants who follow instructions will be considered.

title: Public Relations Assistant I
description:

If you like working hard, having fun with your team, and taking on new challenges with enthusiasm, you’ll fit right in. You’re driven to win, eager to grow, and excited to take ownership of your impact while contributing to something bigger than yourself.

As our PR Assistant, you will work closely with our Publicists to coordinate podcast interviews, handle follow-ups, update internal tracking systems, and ensure clients receive outstanding communication and support.



Your efforts help us deliver an exceptional experience to both clients and podcast hosts and play a direct role in securing high-quality podcast placements.

ntum of the team.

- Post-Interview Follow-Ups

- Client Support Tasks



Requirements:

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Highly organized, detail-driven, and timely

- Ability to follow processes accurately

- Strong communication skills

- Reliable internet connection and consistent availability

- Comfortable working U.S. hours or overlapping with EST, as needed



Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience in podcast booking, PR, admin, or virtual assistance

- Familiarity with tools like Google Drive, sheets, forms, CRMs, or project management systems

- Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines at once



What We Offer:

- Long-term, stable remote work

- Supportive team environment

- Opportunities to grow within the company

- Competitive pay based on experience

- For full-time employees, healthcare

- Bonuses available

title: Developer & Data Specialist
description:
We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Assistant Developer to work directly with our founder at AgentSolar.ai.  You will help with data integrity as well as the development pipeline. You’ll help build features while ensuring the data powering our solar solutions is clean, accurate, and ready for action.

Key Responsibilities

Data Cleaning & Management: Scrubbing, formatting, and validating large datasets to ensure high-quality inputs for our systems.

Development Support: Assisting founder in writing, testing, and deploying code (primarily focused on Node.Js, Google Firebase and cloud and Qdrant + mysql).

Automation: Building scripts to automate repetitive data tasks.

Quality Assurance: Identifying bugs or data discrepancies before they hit production.

Required Skills & Experience

Data Wizardry: Strong experience with Excel/Google Sheets and SQL. You should be comfortable with VLOOKUPs, pivot tables, and complex queries.

Coding Proficiency: Solid foundation and experience with APIs.

Problem Solver: You don’t just report a problem; you look for the root cause.

Communication: Proficient in english (written and verbal) for daily syncs with founders.

Reliability: This is a long-term role. We need someone who is consistent and hits deadlines.

Why Join AgentSolar?

Mentorship: Work 1-on-1 with an experienced lead developer.

Stable Full-Time Work: We are looking for a long-term partner, not a freelancer for a one-off project.

Impact: Your work directly contributes to the growth of renewable energy technology.

title: Technical Solar PV Support Specialist
description:
We’re looking to hire a Technical Solar PV Support Specialist to join our fast growing eCommerce business where we specialize in the sale and installation support of off-grid, portable, hybrid, and emergency backup solar power systems.



You will be handling a high volume of inbound phone calls, live chats and
s all relating to off-grid solar power systems that customers have purchased from us.



Some of your day to day tasks will include:

- Technical phone support with customers - helping figure out issues with their solar kits

- Troubleshooting & issue resolution via phone, live chat and

- Assisting customers with line diagrams, pv input voltage, wiring solar panels and more

- Basic administrative assistance

- Assisting fulfilment and customer service teams with technical knowledge on product exchanges and alternatives



Following 2 weeks of training and shadowing, you will be responding and helping our customers as well as designing custom solar kits. Our Technical Solar PV Support Specialist will work Monday to Friday 9:30am-5:30pm EST.



We believe in supportive teams, an inclusive work environment and providing growth opportunities within your role.



Please address your cover letter to Mr. Golden Sun.





Responsibilities:

Provide troubleshooting and technical support via phone,
 and live chat

Assist fulfilment team with technical knowledge and product recommendations

Assist the product design team with technical knowledge and product recommendations

Uncover and understand customer needs and translate them into requirements.

Assess and address technical risks on customer systems

Provide internal and customer training on how to use products.



Key Requirements For The Role:

STRONG English (verbal & written)

Experience using solar kit design software (ability to design off grid solar systems)

Experience installing or selling off-grid (or grid tie) solar power systems

Familiar with brands and products in the off grid, portable and emergency backup solar power space

Strong customer service skills

Have appropriate remote work set-up - such as quiet space, stable internet connection, and a back-up location in case of issues with the primary location.

Available to work full-time (40 hours per week) on a consistent schedule

Proficiency with technology paired with excellent typing skills.

Possess high level of understanding, patience and empathy

Are committed to continuous growth and learning. You understand that every challenge is an opportunity and you get excited about learning new things.

Ensure privacy and security practices are followed at all times for both customers and the business.

Strong background in PV electrical designs and support

title: WordPress and SEO expert
description:
WordPress Developer + SEO Specialist (Full-Time)



Long-Term | Remote | Fast-Paced Web Projects



We are looking for a high-quality WordPress developer who can build simple, fast, and clean websites using templates and Elementor. This role is for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and comfortable working on multiple sites per week while maintaining strong SEO standards.



Responsibilities



Build simple WordPress websites using templates or Elementor



Create clean, lightweight, mobile-optimized designs



Set up pages, menus, plugins, and branding efficiently



Implement SEO best practices across all sites:



Titles and meta descriptions



H1/H2 structure



Image optimization



Clean permalinks



Internal linking

title: Technical and On Page SEO Specialist
description:
Technical SEO Specialist & On-Page Optimization (WordPress/Elementor)



We are seeking a Technical SEO Specialist who can take full ownership of both the technical health and on-page optimization of our WordPress website built with Elementor.



This role requires a mix of deep technical SEO expertise, content writing skills, and strong organizational habits. You will not only handle audits and fixes but also create, optimize, and publish content — including custom thumbnails — while keeping everything neatly managed in Google Drive.



If you are highly organized, self-driven, and don’t need micro-management, this role is for you.



What You’ll Do:



Conduct a comprehensive technical SEO audit and deliver a detailed report with clear action items.



Identify and fix 404 errors, set up proper 301/302 redirects, and resolve crawl issues.



Optimize internal and external link structures (follow/no-follow attributes).



Improve Core Web Vitals and overall page speed performance.



Implement schema markup and structured data for enhanced SERP features.



Optimize XML sitemaps and robots.txt for maximum crawl efficiency.



Resolve duplicate content and canonicalization issues.



Ensure proper heading hierarchy and metadata optimization across all pages.



Guarantee mobile-first indexing compliance.



Revamp and optimize existing content (titles, descriptions, readability, semantic keywords).



Add alt text, compress images, and apply proper naming conventions for all media assets.



Set up and refine breadcrumb navigation for improved UX and SEO.



Improve URL structures for SEO-friendly consistency.



Ensure proper use of Hreflang, language tags, and geo-targeting.



Optimize anchor text strategy for contextual relevance.



Conduct competitor on-page analysis to identify and apply best practices.



Apply E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) principles across all content.



Write and publish SEO-optimized articles, including keyword research, formatting, and placement.



Create custom thumbnails and visuals for articles to improve CTR.



Organize all content, media, and documentation in Google Drive, using a clear folder structure.



Monitor indexation, crawl stats, and ranking signals after implementation, with follow-up reporting.





What We’re Looking For:



3+ years of proven experience in technical SEO and on-page optimization.



Strong WordPress + Elementor expertise with hands-on publishing experience.



Skilled with SEO tools: Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Screaming Frog, Ahrefs/SEMrush (or similar).



Solid HTML/CSS knowledge for on-page troubleshooting.



Practical experience with WordPress SEO plugins (Yoast, RankMath, etc.).



Ability to write high-quality, SEO-friendly content.



Experience creating thumbnails/graphics for articles (basic design skills).



Highly organized, with a proven ability to manage assets properly (Google Drive folder structures, documentation, version control).



Self-managed, proactive, and can deliver a high output of tasks fast and efficiently



 Able to take ownership of tasks without micro-management.



Strong communicator who can work collaboratively but also independently deliver results.

title: German-Speaking Virtual Assistant for Amazon FBA Research & Reporting
description:
Important: This role requires good written German. Please only apply if you can confidently write in German.



We are a growing Amazon FBA brand based in Berlin, Germany, and we are looking for a reliable German-speaking Virtual Assistant to support us with product research, reporting, and basic Amazon operational tasks.



Main responsibilities:



1. Product research / niche analysis

- Complete structured niche analysis templates based on our internal framework

- Use tools such as Helium 10, Amazon Seller Central (including Product Opportunity Explorer), and Data Dive

- One analysis usually takes around 2 hours

- Target: at least 20 completed analyses per month



2. Reporting / KPI tracking

- Collect weekly KPI data from Amazon Seller Central, Advertising Console, and Sellerboard

- Enter all relevant numbers into Google Sheets

- There is also historical data that needs to be backfilled



3. Daily checks

- Check inventory levels daily

- Check whether all listings are live

- Create and manage Amazon Seller Support cases or tickets if needed



Optional later:

- German customer support, but without making refund or replacement decisions independently



What we are looking for:

- Very good written German

- Strong attention to detail

- Structured and reliable working style

- Good Excel / Google Sheets skills

- Ideally experience with Amazon Seller Central, Helium 10, or e-commerce reporting

- Comfortable following SOPs, videos, and written instructions



To apply, please include:

1. A short introduction in German

2. Your experience with Amazon, e-commerce, or reporting tools

3. Your level of German

4. Your hourly or monthly rate

5. A short example of a report, spreadsheet, or research task you have done before



We prefer applicants who are organized, proactive, and able to work independently with clear instructions.

title: AI Content Operator & Video Editor (Short-Form / Growth-Focused)
description:
We run a fast-growing online health company helping people get out of pain and move better without relying on traditional healthcare. We create a lot of content (short-form videos, ads, educational content), and we’re looking for someone who can help us turn 1 video into 10–30 high-performing pieces of content using AI.



This is NOT a basic video editing job. This is NOT just dropping a video into OpusClip (or other similar tool).

We are looking for someone who understands content, attention, and performance. Great English communication is required.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

Take raw video footage and turn it into:

- Short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

- Editing Long form videos (youtube)

- Adding AI b-roll or creating AI generated videos based on a script. 

- Ad creatives

- Create multiple variations of the same content (different hooks, captions, pacing)



Use AI tools to:

- Rewrite hooks and scripts

- Generate new content ideas

- Add captions, fast cuts, zooms, and edits that improve retention



TOOLS YOU SHOULD BE FAMILIAR WITH:

- Descript

- CapCut/Premiere Pro/Final Cut

- Claude/ChatGPT or similar for scripting + ideation

- HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana, Opus, or AI content tools



THIS JOB IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

- You don’t use AI tools regularly

- You only know how to edit but don’t understand content performance

- You need step-by-step instructions for everything

- You focus on making things “look pretty” instead of performing well



THIS JOB IS FOR YOU IF:

- You enjoy breaking down viral videos and recreating them

- You like testing different hooks and ideas

- You want to grow with a company long-term

- You’re excited about AI and using it to work faster and smarter



If you're interested, add the words, Orange Cactus, to the end of your
.



Hope to hear from you!

title: Quality Control Auditor
description:
Must apply via this application link:





Quality Control Auditor



Reports to: Quality Control Manager



Headquarters: Savannah, GA; USA





Job Location: Remote





What we do at Dental Claim Support:



DCS is a dental revenue cycle management company that works with dentists, dental offices, and DSOs in the United States. DCS empowers dental teams by integrating highly trained RCM experts and a unique technology framework to maximize profitability and catalyze growth. Our dental billing systems and processes allow our employees to work all aspects of the full revenue cycle system efficiently, to increase profits for dental practices and groups.





Position Summary:



As a Quality Control Auditor, your primary responsibility is to support the Quality Control team by performing various tasks related to auditing and verifying the accuracy of our dental revenue cycle management services. Operating as an independent contractor, you will assist in reviewing billing processes, insurance claims, clearinghouses, and documentation to ensure compliance with company standards and industry regulations. This role requires a keen attention to detail, strong organizational skills, and the ability to work independently while contributing to the overall quality of our services.





How the Quality Control Auditor fits in:



The Quality Control Auditor plays a vital role in maintaining the integrity and accuracy of our dental revenue cycle management processes. As an independent contractor, you will work closely with the Quality Control Manager and other tea
mbers to identify errors, ensure compliance, and support process improvements. Your contributions will help safeguard the quality of our services, leading to improved client satisfaction and operational efficiency.



In this role, you will:



Audit Support:



Assist in auditing various aspects of the dental revenue cycle management process, including insurance claims, payment postings, and outstanding claims.



Data Verification:



Verify the accuracy and consistency of data within billing systems, ensuring that all entries comply with company standards and industry regulations.



Compliance Monitoring:



Help monitor compliance with healthcare regulations, including HIPAA, and ensure that all billing practices adhere to legal and ethical standards.



Documentation and Reporting:



Maintain accurate records of audit findings and assist in preparing reports for the Quality Control Manager.



Collaboration and Communication:



Work closely with the Quality Control Manager and other tea
mbers to identify discrepancies and provide feedback for process improvements.



Continuous Learning:



Stay informed about industry trends and updates in dental revenue cycle management to ensure ongoing compliance and quality improvement.



Self-Management and Independence:



Manage your tasks effectively, demonstrating the ability to work independently while maintaining high standards of accuracy and quality.





Success Criteria:



Compliance Adherence:



Ensure 100% compliance with healthcare regulations and company policies in all tasks performed.



Timely Task Completion:



Auditors are expected to complete 3-5 audits per day, depending on complexity. 



Collaboration and Feedback:



Provide actionable feedback to tea
mbers, leading to process improvements and enhanced accuracy in billing operations.



Salary: $5.63 per hour



Requirements:



1+ year of experience in an administrative or support role with dental insurance.

Experience working as an independent contractor is preferred.

Familiarity with working with independent contractors on a global scale.

High School diploma or GED; some college coursework is a plus.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook, etc.), Google Workspace, and familiarity with practice management softwares (e.g., Dentrix, Eaglesoft, Open Dental, etc.).

Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple tasks independently.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

Ability to work independently and manage your own workload effectively.









Our Company Values:



Customer Success

Transparency

Reliability

Professional Excellence

Alignment



Must apply via website:

title: Insurance Billing Assistant
description:
Must apply via website: 





Insurance Billing Assistant



Reports to: Account Manager





Headquarters: Savannah, GA





Job Location: Remote



What we do at Dental Claim Support:



DCS is a dental revenue cycle management company that works with dentists, dental offices, and DSOs in the United States. DCS empowers dental teams by integrating highly trained RCM experts and a unique technology framework to maximize profitability and catalyze growth. Our dental billing systems and processes allow our employees to work all aspects of the full revenue cycle system efficiently, to increase profits for dental practices and groups.



Position Summary:



Dental Claim Support is seeking a detail-oriented and organized Insurance Billing Assistant to join our team. Reporting to the Team Lead, the successful candidate will focus on managing and resolving outstanding claims on insurance aging reports and submitting daily claims, including appeals and reconsiderations. This role requires a strong understanding of dental insurance claims processes, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently to ensure claims are processed efficiently, accurately, and with all necessary supporting documentation.



How the Insurance Billing Assistant fits in:



The Insurance Billing Assistant is critical to ensuring that outstanding claims are resolved and daily claims are submitted without delay. By diligently working through insurance aging reports and managing the submission of claims, appeals, and reconsiderations, including all necessary documentation, you will directly contribute to the financial health and operational success of our clients. Collaboration with teammates is also key to this role, as you will work closely with your Team Lead and other tea
mbers to share information, resolve complex claims, and ensure consistency and accuracy in the claims process. Your ability to work effectively within a team will enhance the overall efficiency and success of the claims management process.





In this role, you will:



Managing Outstanding Claims:



Review and work through insurance aging reports to identify and resolve outstanding claims.

Follow up on pending claims with insurance carriers to ensure timely reimbursement and reduce aging accounts.



Claims Submission, Appeals, and Reconsiderations:



Prepare and submit daily claims for dental services, ensuring accuracy, compliance with payer requirements, and inclusion of all necessary supporting documentation.

Handle the submission of appeals and reconsiderations for denied or underpaid claims, providing the required documentation and follow-up.



Documentation and Data Management:



Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of claims, appeals, and reconsiderations in our database.

Ensure all claims documentation, including supporting documents, appeals, and reconsiderations, is correctly filed and accessible for audits or client inquiries.



Technical Competencies:



Demonstrate familiarity with dental insurance claim forms, coding, and payer requirements.

Utilize claims management software and databases to track the progress of claims and manage outstanding accounts.



Attention to Detail and Time Management:



Submit accurate and complete claims, appeals, and reconsiderations, adhering to deadlines and ensuring timely task completion.

Work independently to manage multiple tasks, focusing on reducing the insurance aging report and ensuring daily claims are processed with all necessary documentation.



Client Interaction and Relationship Management:



Communicate with insurance payers, providers, and internal teams as needed, representing DCS professionally.

Assist in maintaining positive relationships with external partners to support the claims process.



Independent Work and Growth Mindset:



Manage your workload effectively, demonstrating the ability to work independently while meeting expectations.

Seek opportunities to learn and grow in the field of dental insurance claims, particularly in claims resolution, appeals, and reconsiderations.



Problem Solving and Efficiency:



Identify and resolve issues related to outstanding claims, appeals, and reconsiderations, working efficiently to minimize disruptions to client services.

Implement process improvements to enhance the accuracy and efficiency of claims processing tasks.



Client Service and Accountability:



Provide exceptional service to clients, ensuring that inquiries about outstanding claims, appeals, and reconsiderations are addressed promptly and accurately.

Take responsibility for the accuracy and completeness of claims, appeals, reconsiderations, and supporting documentation.









Success Criteria:



Client Retention and Satisfaction:



Maintain a Client Retention Rate of 90% or higher.

Maintain a Net Promoter Score (NPS) of 8 or above for accounts assigned to the Insurance Billing Assistant's specific book of business.



Revenue Generation:



Insurance Billing Assistants are expected to contribute to the individual book of business minimum equivalent to $100,000 insurance collections per month.



Outstanding Claims Resolution:



Resolve a minimum of 40 claims per day when working on outstanding claims.



Claim Submission Accuracy:



Maintain an insurance claims submission accuracy rate of 98%.



Audit Score:



Maintain an overall audit score of 90% or higher.







Requirements:



1+ year of experience in an administrative support role, preferably within a healthcare or dental setting.

Experience working as an independent contractor is preferred.

Familiarity with working with independent contractors on a global scale.

High School diploma or GED; some college coursework is a plus.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook, etc.); experience with credentialing software is advantageous.

Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple tasks independently.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

Ability to work independently and manage your own workload effectively.



Our Company Values:



Customer Success

Transparency

Reliability

Professional Excellence

Alignment

title: FMCSA Safety & DOT Compliance Specialist
description:
About the Company



We are a growing U.S.-based trucking and logistics company working with major freight brokers across the United States. We are looking for a detail-oriented Safety & Compliance Specialist who understands FMCSA regulations and DOT compliance requirements to support our safety department.



This role is fully remote and requires working during U.S. business hours.



Responsibilities



• Maintain and organize Driver Qualification Files (DQF)

• Monitor and review MVR reports and driver records

• Manage FMCSA Clearinghouse compliance

• Track and maintain DOT drug & alcohol program requirements

• Ensure compliance with FMCSA regulations and safety policies

• Assist with ELD / Hours of Service (HOS) monitoring

• Prepare documentation for DOT audits and safety reviews

• Maintain driver training and safety documentation

• Communicate with drivers and internal team regarding safety issues



Requirements



• Experience working with U.S. trucking companies preferred

• Knowledge of FMCSA regulations and DOT compliance

• Experience with Driver Qualification Files (DQF)

• Familiarity with ELD systems and Hours of Service rules

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Good English communication skills

• Ability to work U.S. time zone



Nice to Have



• Experience with Samsara, Motive (KeepTruckin), or Geotab ELD

• Experience preparing companies for DOT audits

• Knowledge of IFTA / IRP compliance



What We Offer



• Long-term stable position

• Work directly with a U.S. trucking company

• Growth opportunities in safety and compliance management

• Competitive salary based on experience



How to Apply



Please include:



• Resume

• Description of your experience with FMCSA / DOT compliance

• Example of safety or compliance work you have done for a trucking company

title: Fluent English Payroll & Commission Specialist (Advanced Spreadsheets)
description:
About the Role:



We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Payroll & Commission Specialist to join our team long-term. Your primary mission will be managing our payroll and calculating commissions for our sales team.



Because our sales commissions are calculated manually, this is not a standard data-entry job. You need to be a true expert in Excel or Google Sheets. If you love working with large data sets, building complex formulas, and ensuring everyone gets paid flawlessly and on time, this is the perfect role for you.



Key Responsibilities:



Manual Commission Calculations: Take raw sales data and use advanced spreadsheets to accurately calculate commissions for our sales team on a regular basis.



Payroll Processing: Track employee hours, verify payouts, and accurately process our regular payroll runs so the team is paid on time, every time.



Spreadsheet Mastery & Organization: Build, maintain, and optimize the spreadsheets we use to track sales, payouts, and financial data.



General Financial Admin: Keep our back-office organized, manage digital receipts, and assist with light, general bookkeeping as needed (credit card reconciliation is a very minor part of this role).



What You Need to Succeed:



Advanced Spreadsheet Skills: This is the most critical skill. You must be fast and highly proficient in Excel/Google Sheets (you should use tools like Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, IF statements, and complex formulas in your sleep).



Flawless English Communication: You will be communicating directly with the business owner and the sales team regarding their pay, so clear, C1/C2 level written and spoken English is strictly required.



Extreme Attention to Detail: When calculating commissions by hand, a single typo costs the company money or makes a salesperson angry. We need someone who obsessively double-checks their work.



Trust & Reliability: You will be handling highly sensitive payroll data, so high integrity is non-negotiable.



Work Hours & Compensation:



Schedule: [Insert Days of the week] from [Insert Start Time] to [Insert End Time] [Insert Time Zone, e.g., EST / PST].



Pay:$700 - $900/month], depending on your level of spreadsheet expertise.



How to Apply:

We only hire people with excellent attention to detail. To prove you have read this entire post and can follow instructions, please do not use a standard copy-paste application. Instead:



Change the subject line of your application message to: Green Calculator - [Your Name]



In the very first sentence of your cover letter, tell us what your favorite Excel or Google Sheets formula is and exactly why you like it.



Briefly explain (in 2 to 3 sentences maximum) your personal process for double-checking your own work when calculating payroll or commissions to ensure there are zero errors.



Include a link to a short voice recording (using Vocaroo or a similar tool) introducing yourself, summarizing your experience with payroll/spreadsheets, and confirming your internet setup is reliable.



Applications that do not follow these exact instructions will be automatically deleted. We look forward to meeting you!

title: Amazon Creative Manager
description:
Amazon Creative Manager



We are a fast-growing greeting card brand. We help people create real connection through beautifully made, responsibly produced cards crafted with care.



We are hiring an Amazon Creative Manager to build a consistent, visually recognizable Amazon presence, so every listing looks like one brand and every product stands out.



This is an ownership role. We run lean, move fast, and collaborate long term. We do not micromanage. We expect you to own outcomes, not just complete tasks.



Why This Role Exists

Our products are already winning. What is missing is a creative system that scales.



Right now, creative execution and testing are not a consistent weekly process. That slows listing improvements, launches, and brand consistency across Amazon.



We are hiring this role to own Amazon creative end to end, so listings and ad assets improve every week, not occasionally.



What You Will Be Responsible For



You will own Amazon creative performance. You should be comfortable using AI tools (Google Gemini, Google AI Studio, Runway, Adobe Firefly etc.) to speed up iteration and production while keeping brand consistency.



You will own:

• Brand consistency: clear visual guidelines so every listing looks like one brand and communicates clearly

• Listing and ad creatives: improve listing creatives and produce ad assets that increase CTR and CVR

• Weekly creative testing: run tests, track results, and optimize based on what works

• AI-powered creative execution: use AI tools to accelerate production, ideation, and testing?



Who This Role Is NOT For



This role is not for:

• Someone looking for a side project or unstable availability

• Someone managing multiple brands or clients at the same time

• Someone who needs daily direction or constant check ins

• Someone who is slow to ship or misses deadlines

• Someone looking for short term freelance work instead of long term partnership



What We Expect From You



We expect:

• Ownership and accountability for outcomes, not tasks

• Clear, proactive communication and early flagging of issues

• Ability to work independently with structure and good judgment

• A test, learn, improve mindset with comfort using data

• Practical AI skills, comfortable using AI tools to move faster and produce better creative output



How to Apply



Please send:

• Your CV

• Two examples of Amazon listing creatives you improved, with a short explanation of what you changed and why

• Include the word compounding in the first line of your application so we know you read this carefully



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.

title: Senior Operations Manager | Marketing Agency
description:
PLEASE READ THE FULL DESCRIPTION AND ANSWER THE SCREENING QUESTIONS BEFORE APPLYING





SENIOR OPERATIONS MANAGER

Full-time · Remote · Long-term · Start ASAP

Up to $2,000/month for the right candidate





?????????????????????????????????????





ABOUT US



LGP is a UK-based lead generation company that drives results for clients through paid media — primarily
 Ads and Google Ads. We've grown on founder-led hustle, and now we're at the point where we need real infrastructure: systems, processes, and a team that can scale without us being the bottleneck.



We're actively expanding into Australia and the USA. To get there, we're building an overseas team based in the Philippines — and we need someone senior to own that build from the ground up.





?????????????????????????????????????





THE ROLE



This is a senior hire, not an assistant role. You'll be the operational backbone of the company: the person who stands between two founders and a growing remote team and makes sure everything actually works.



You'll set up Slack, build onboarding flows, write the SOPs, recruit the hires, and hold the team to a high standard — all while keeping the founders informed without needing to be chased.



If you do this well, the natural next step is Head of Operations as the company scales. We're hiring for that trajectory.





?????????????????????????????????????





WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Recruitment — Run end-to-end hiring for all overseas roles. You know the Filipino talent market and you know how to find strong candidates, particularly people with digital marketing and paid media experience.



Onboarding & Training — Design and deliver onboarding for every new hire. Build training materials that scale as the team grows.



SOPs & Systems — Work alongside our automations specialist to document every process. Set up and maintain the tools the team uses day-to-day (Slack, project management, dashboards, etc.). The goal: the business runs on systems, not on memory.



Performance & HR — Keep the team performing. Handle HR matters with professionalism and cultural sensitivity. Flag problems early.



Billing & Admin — Manage billing and financial admin through the LGP dashboard.



Founder Liaison — Be the bridge between the overseas team and the founders. Translate working styles in both directions so nothing gets lost.





?????????????????????????????????????





WHO YOU ARE



? 4+ years managing remote or distributed teams (you'll need to show evidence of this)

? Experience in end-to-end recruitment, especially sourcing through OnlineJobs.ph and similar platforms

? Background in digital marketing, lead generation, or a paid media agency is a strong advantage — you understand what good work looks like in this space

? Confident communicator with strong written English — you give updates proactively and flag issues before they become problems

? Process-driven — you document what you build and you build things that last

? Hungry to grow — this role is the foundation of a Head of Operations position





?????????????????????????????????????





WHAT WE OFFER



? Full-time, long-term engagement — we hire for careers, not contracts

? Competitive monthly salary, paid reliably and on time

? 100% remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines

? Direct access to founders — no layers of management, no bureaucracy

? Clear growth path — perform well and the Head of Ops role is yours





?????????????????????????????????????





HOW TO APPLY



Send your application through OnlineJobs.ph. In your message, include:



1. A brief overview of your ops experience and the size of teams you've managed

2. A real SOP or process document you've written (any format — PDF, Google Doc, Notion). We're looking for structure, clarity, and original thinking.

3. A short Loom video walkthrough of how you'd approach onboarding a new hire in your first week

4. LinkedIn profiles of 2–3 people you've personally hired





?????????????????????????????????????





SCREENING QUESTIONS — Please answer all three:



1. Describe a time when a hire didn't work out. What was your role in that, and what did you change as a result?



2. What's the most common mistake Western founders make when managing remote Filipino teams?



3. Name the specific tools you've used to build automations or SOPs.





?????????????????????????????????????





Applications without a personal message will not be considered.

title: Outreach QA Reviewer
description:
# Outreach QA Reviewer - Remote (Part-Time)



**Company:** algoacquisition

**Location:** Remote (Philippines)

**Hours:** Part-time (approximately 2-5 hours/week, but you must be available and responsive during US business hours)

**Base Salary:** $150/month

**Bonuses:** Per-approval performance bonus (see Compensation below)

**Payment:** Weekly



---



## About Us



algoacquisition is an AI-powered lead generation and outreach service for B2B clients. Our systems generate outbound campaigns and draft reply
s automatically. We need someone available during US hours to review and approve these messages before they go out.



---



## The Role



This is a simple job. When a lead replies to one of our campaigns, our AI drafts a response
. You get a Slack notification with the draft. Your job is to:



1. Read the draft

2. Check if it makes sense (correct names, correct company, no nonsense)

3. Approve it, edit it if something is off, or reject it if the lead is junk



That is the entire job. Most reviews take under a minute. As long as you can respond to notifications quickly and accurately, you will be rewarded.



---



## Compensation



**Base:** $150/month for being available and on-call during US hours.



**Per-approval bonus (on top of base):**



- Approved within 5 minutes and correct: **$10 bonus**

- Approved within 5-15 minutes and correct: **$5 bonus**

- Approved after 15 minutes: **$3 bonus**



Correctness is QA'd by the founder. The faster and more accurate you are, the more you earn. This is designed to reward you for being responsive.



---



## Requirements



- Strong written English (non-negotiable, you are editing
s sent to US professionals)

- Common sense and critical thinking (can you tell when something sounds wrong?)

- Must be available and responsive during US business hours (EST/PST)

- Comfortable using Slack on your phone and desktop

- Reliable internet connection

- Able to respond to notifications quickly throughout the day



---



## Nice to Have



- Experience with cold
, outreach, or B2B sales

- Familiarity with recruitment or staffing industry



---



## Perks



- Fully remote, work from home

- Very light workload (2-5 hours/week, spread across the day)

- Free access to Claude AI (Anthropic's AI assistant) for personal and professional use

- Opportunity to take on more responsibility and grow into a larger role as the company scales

- Work directly with the founder



---



## How to Apply



Send a message with:



1. A short intro about yourself

2. What hours you are available in US timezone

3. An example of a time you caught an error or mistake that others missed



Generic copy-paste applications will be ignored.

-Background in health, wellness, or documentary-style media.

Our team supports multiple operational systems including CRM, project management, and accounting tools. I am looking for someone who can take ownership of system support, reporting, and integrations, helping keep our operations organized and efficient.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:

Managing AccuLynx (user setup, permissions, configurations, and locations)

Troubleshooting system and integration issues

Building and maintaining advanced Excel reports

Managing tickets and support requests through ZoHo Desk

Supporting integrations across SalesRabbit and eventually Sage Intacct

 or Vizio

s, messages, and phone communication professionally

Qualifications



Required:

Preferred:

Key Traits for Success

etings.

title: Assistant Contract Analyst
description:
Position Summary



The Assistant Contract Analyst supports the Vice President of Compliance in managing the lifecycle of company contracts and agreements. This role focuses on contract preparation, review, tracking, and compliance oversight to reduce operational and legal risk. The position coordinates across departments to ensure contracts are accurate, compliant, and executed efficiently.

Comfort working with digital document management systems.

Education

This position description is not intended to be an exhaustive list of duties. Responsibilities may change based on business needs.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Strong computer proficiency

Strong analytical and detail-oriented aptitude; a high degree of accuracy is required.

title: Full-Time Performance Media Buyer (Google + Meta + Amazon) Remote / Overseas
description:
We're hiring a full-time performance media buyer to manage paid advertising across Google, Meta 
 & Instagram), and Amazon for our portfolio of consumer product brands.



This role works alongside AI-powered campaign optimization platforms (Madgicx, Adspert, and similar tools) that handle bid management, budget pacing, and audience optimization automatically. Your job is to be the strategic brain on top of those tools — interpreting performance data, writing creative briefs for our ad creative team, developing campaign messaging, and making sure the right content is being produced for the right platforms.



This is a 40-hour/week role.

Please
 resume to apply.



Brands You'll Work On

• Baby Delight

• Joovy

• Omada Golf

• Go With Me

• Phantom Farms

• Phantom Farms Brewing

• Macari Properties



What You'll Do



Performance Analysis & Strategy

• Review AI platform dashboards daily across Meta, Google, and Amazon to identify what's working and what's not

• Translate performance data into actionable creative briefs for the design and video team

• Develop and refine campaign themes and messaging angles for each brand

• Identify winning creative patterns (visual styles, copy angles, formats) and brief more of what converts

• Flag underperforming campaigns and recommend creative pivots

• Monitor ROAS, CPA, CAC, conversion rate, and spend pacing across all platforms



Creative Brief Writing & Management

• Write 5+ detailed creative briefs per day specifying platform, format, messaging angle, target audience, and brand

• Manage the daily brief pipeline so the creative team always has work queued each morning

• Provide clear feedback on completed ad creatives based on past performance data

• Coordinate creative testing strategy — what to test, when to rotate, when to scale winners



Platform Management (Working With AI Tools)

• Configure and oversee AI optimization rules within Madgicx (Meta + Google) and Amazon PPC tools (Adspert or AiHello)

• Review AI-recommended bid adjustments, audience changes, and budget allocations — approve, adjust, or override as needed

• Upload approved creative assets to ad platforms and launch campaigns

• Manage campaign structure, naming conventions, and organization across all accounts

• Set up and maintain conversion tracking and attribution across platforms



Reporting & Communication

• Report performance weekly to the Creative Director with clear insights (not just numbers)

• Flag issues early — budget pacing problems, creative fatigue, audience saturation

• Communicate which creative directions are driving results to inform upcoming photoshoots and video production

• Participate in weekly planning sessions to align ad strategy with brand priorities



What You Must Have

• Proven hands-on experience running Google and Meta ads for ecommerce or consumer products

• Strong working knowledge of Google Ads (Search, Shopping, Performance Max, Display, YouTube), Meta Ads Manager, and ideally Amazon Sponsored Brands / Sponsored Display

• Experience with AI-powered ad optimization platforms (Madgicx, Revealbot, 
, Adspert, or similar) — or strong willingness and aptitude to learn quickly

• Ability to interpret performance data and translate it into specific, actionable creative direction

• Strong brief-writing skills — you can clearly articulate what a designer or video editor needs to create

• Experience managing real ad budgets for ecommerce or DTC brands

• Clear written English

• Reliable internet + consistent availability

• Ability to overlap 3–4 hours daily with U.S. Eastern Time



Bonus Skills

• Experience with Amazon advertising (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display)

• Familiarity with TikTok ad management

• Background in creative strategy or performance creative

• Experience working with overseas creative teams



What This Role Is NOT

• Not part-time

• Not a VA role

• Not an agency coordinator

• Not a traditional media buyer who only manages bids manually — AI handles the mechanical optimization; you handle the strategy

• Not a "learning on the job" position — you should already understand ad platforms and performance metrics



What Success Looks Like

• The creative team receives clear, data-driven briefs every morning

• ROAS improves month over month across all brands

• Winning creative patterns are identified quickly and scaled through new briefs

• Underperforming campaigns are flagged and pivoted early

• Creative testing is structured and consistent, not random

• AI tools are configured properly and reviewed regularly — not blindly trusted

• Leadership does not need to micromanage performance or brief quality



How to Apply

Send:

1. A short summary of your Google and Meta ad buying experience, including any experience with AI optimization platforms

2. Types of campaigns you've managed (Search, Shopping, Performance Max, Meta conversion campaigns, Amazon Sponsored ads, etc.)

3. Approximate monthly ad budgets you've personally managed

4. A brief example of how you'd write a creative brief for a baby product ad on Meta (1–2 paragraphs is fine)

5. Any case studies or screenshots showing results (optional but helpful)



***PLEASE NOTE - ALL APPLICANT SUBMISSIONS WILL BE SCANNED FOR AI USE, PLEASE WRITE THEM IN YOUR OWN WORDS***

 Requirements

2+ years’ hands-on experience with

Excellent written and spoken English.

title: Website Designer | Creative Portfolio Builder & Strategist
description:
Type: Contract / Part-time (with potential to grow quickly within design branding team)

Location: Fully remote

Start: Paid test project if quality to level #2 candidate, then ongoing work if you crush it

Tools: Canva (required), AI tools (mandatory for design inspiration), Slack, Notion

Compensation: Salary with bonus (discussed after screening)

Team: 10+ Employees Across Canada/USA | 2+ VA's from Philippines | 5+ worldwide



We're not looking for someone who "makes things pretty." We need someone who can look at a portfolio or landing page and know what's broken, what's missing, and how to make it convert. Whether you come from web design, brand design, or portfolio design, if you can make magic in Canva and think strategically, keep reading.



>> ABOUT WOVVO

Wovvo is a UGC platform built by two founders tired of watching talented creators struggle to find paid work. We're bootstrapping in public and building the go-to destination for creators who want real brand deals, with a strong branded portfolio to match. Part of our mission: helping creators present themselves like professionals on their Canva website. That's where you come in.



>> WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO

You'll redesign UGC creator portfolios from the ground up, sometimes revamping an existing one, sometimes building from scratch. Every portfolio should answer one question for brands: "Why should I hire this creator?"



• Audit existing portfolios and identify what's killing conversions

• Rebuild structure, messaging, visual hierarchy, and credibility signals

• Create high-end Canva designs that look custom, not cookie-cutter

• Design case study sections, testimonial layouts, and video showcases

• Use AI tools to speed up workflow without sacrificing originality

• Deliver polished, brand-ready portfolios within MAX 10 hours per project



>>NOT FOR YOU IF…

• You think "good design" = picking a Canva template and swapping text

• You can't explain WHY a design works

• You've never thought about conversion or brand psychology

• You need 3+ days to finish a single portfolio

• You don't use AI in your workflow



>> FOR YOU IF…

• You spot what's wrong with a portfolio, landing page, or website immediately

• You understand design is persuasion, not just aesthetics

• You come from web, brand, or any design background and make Canva do things most people didn't know it could

• You're fast, structured, and self-managing

• You use AI to accelerate your process, not replace your thinking



>> MUST-HAVES<<

• Advanced Canva skills (actually advanced, not "I use templates")

• Strong visual eye: typography, spacing, hierarchy, color

• Design experience: web design, brand design, portfolios, landing pages, pitch decks

• Understanding of conversion design: how layout and messaging drive action

• Experience with AI design tools as part of your workflow



—--------



>> PLEASE ANSWER <<

1. Share a link to your portfolio or 1–2 design projects you're proud of specifically (websites, landing pages, portfolios, decks).



2. How confident are you writing copy that sells? A portfolio isn't just designs, the words need to make brands want to reach out. Can you take a weak/ missing copy and turn it into messaging that attracts brand deals?"



4. Everyone says they do 'high-quality work.' We want specifics. What does high-end design actually look like to you?



5. Do you use AI tools in your design workflow? (we encourage it) Tell us how,  a specific example is great.



—-----



>> HOW TO APPLY<<

Answer all 5 screening questions and include a links to website work (don’t make me look for it).



Bonus: How would you make these UGC portfolios better?









>>2nd Phase of Job Application | TEST PROJECT | Budget $100 CAD for 8 hours.<<

If you pass screening, we'll send you a real portfolio that needs work. Your test-project is to propose your “vision with AI tools to create a mock-up of your redesign vision” then it’s time to get to work to revamp the portfolio completely.





We're a tiny team building something AMAAZING. If you're as good as you think you are, we'd love to hear from you!!!! We want you long-term, hopefully 5 years +

title: Supply Chain Manager for Fast Growing eCommerce Brand
description:
Dear Applicant,

We run a fast-growing eCommerce clothing brand selling primarily to customers in the United States.

As we continue to scale, we are looking for a Supply Chain Manager to join our team long-term. This is a key role in our operations, ensuring smooth communication with suppliers and maintaining high standards across our product flow.

There is strong growth potential for someone who consistently contributes, takes ownership, and communicates effectively.



About the Role

You will be responsible for managing all communication with our suppliers while coordinating closely with our internal team to ensure operations run smoothly.

This role requires strong organization, attention to detail, and the ability to proactively solve problems.

This role also includes performance-based bonuses tied to results and operational efficiency.



Responsibilities:

Communicate daily with suppliers regarding orders, stock, and production

Ensure out-of-stock variants (colors/sizes) are removed or updated on the website

Handle order cancellations and modifications with suppliers

Coordinate and manage returns to suppliers

Request and negotiate price deductions when applicable

Perform and oversee quality checks with suppliers

Identify and report potential issues in the supply chain before they escalate

Work closely with internal tea
mbers (customer support, operations) to ensure alignment

Help improve internal processes and supply chain workflows over time



MUST HAVE KNOWLEDGE OF THESE PLATFORMS:

Shopify (eCommerce platform)


 (team communication)

Google Sheets / Excel (order tracking & reporting)



We Will Provide You With:

Clear SOPs and processes

Video training

Ongoing support from the team

A structured system to help you succeed in the role



Compensation:

Competitive base pay (based on experience)

Performance-based bonuses when specific targets are achieved

Clear KPIs so you understand how to increase your earnings



Applicant Requirements:

Proven experience in Supply Chain Management (this is mandatory)

Ability to clearly explain previous experience and responsibilities

Strong written and verbal English communication

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Proactive and solution-focused mindset

Ability to work independently and take ownership

Available for weekly team calls

Ready to start part-time, with transition to full-time as we grow

Not currently committed to another full-time role



Important:

This is not an entry-level role. We are specifically looking for someone with real, hands-on experience managing supplier communication, order flow, and operational processes.



How to Apply:

Please include:

Your previous experience in supply chain management

Specific tasks you handled in your previous roles

Why you believe you are a strong fit for this position



We are building a strong team and looking for people who want to grow with us long-term.

If that sounds like you, we look forward to your application.

Thank you.

title: Static Graphic Designer
description:
About the Role

Bespoke Health Media is a fast-growing health and wellness media company producing high-impact content across social media, editorial and brand campaigns. We are looking for a talented Static Graphic Designer with a sharp eye for scroll-stopping visuals, a strong command of social media content and a genuine interest in the health and wellness space.

This is a high-output role that requires both creative excellence and the ability to work at pace. You will be producing content that educates, engages and converts — from carousels and infographics to branded templates and campaign assets.



What You’ll Do:

-Create Social Assets: Design high-quality carousels, infographics, and feed posts for all platforms.

title: Client Advocate & Pre-Approval Success Manager
description:
Job Title: Client Advocate & Pre-Approval Success Manager

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Shift: US Business Hours 10:00AM - 6:00 PM (EST)



Role Overview

Are you a confident communicator who understands the "American Dream" of homeownership? We are looking for a high-energy Client Advocate to bridge the gap between a client’s current financial status and their new home. You won't just be "processing files"; you will be a strategic leader, a credit expert, and a motivational coach who ensures our clients cross the finish line to mortgage pre-approval.



Key Responsibilities

Credit & Real Estate Strategy: Guide clients through the complexities of US credit scoring and the real estate journey.



Task Execution: Proactively assist clients in completing specific tasks (document gathering, debt pay-downs, etc.) required for loan pre-approval.



Documentation Mastery: Maintain meticulous records of client accounts, ensuring every step of the journey is logged with precision.



Internal Leadership: Act as the "Quarterback" for the client’s file. Communicate clear needs to the internal team and hold all parties accountable to deadlines.



Client Relationship Management: Use your vibrant personality to build trust, overcome objections, and keep clients excited about their home-buying goals.



What We Are Looking For

Subject Matter Expertise: Proven experience in US Real Estate and/or Credit Repair/Improvement. You must understand how the FICO system works.



Linguistic Mastery: Exceptional English skills (both written and verbal). You should be able to communicate complex financial concepts simply and confidently.



Leadership DNA: You don't wait for instructions; you see a bottleneck and solve it. You are comfortable leading a team and managing client expectations.



Tech-Savvy & Well-Equipped: You must have a reliable, high-speed internet connection, a professional-grade headset, and a quiet, distraction-free workspace.



Personality: You are empathetic yet firm. You have the "it" factor that makes clients feel supported and motivated.



Technical Requirements

Processor: Core i5 / Ryzen 5 or higher.



RAM: 8GB minimum (16GB preferred).



Internet: 25 Mbps minimum (with a backup power/internet solution).



Audio: Noise-canceling headset (e.g., Jabra, Plantronics, or Logitech).



Why Join Us?

We believe in empowering our tea
mbers as much as our clients. You will have a seat at the table, a voice in our processes, and the satisfaction of helping families move into their forever homes.



How to Apply:

Please send your resume along with a 1-minute video intro explaining why your personality and experience make you the perfect advocate for our clients.

title: Healthcare Virtual Assistant (full/part-time)
description:
APPLICATION PROCESS:

1
 us your resume in PDF format only. Include all of the jobs you've worked at, listing the month and year. Do not leave anything off. Do not leave anything off.  You must provide an explanation of any gaps in your work history. Include the compensation you received for each job. Do not give us your hourly pay, only your annual compensation or total compensation.  If there is any gap in your resume without an explanation of the gap, you will be disqualified.  Do not send us a traditional resume or you'll automatically be disqualified.  Your resume should contain all of the above info we requested in order and easy for us to understand.  



2.
 us a 60-second video of yourself answering the following question:

What are the 3 most important things that the company you work for MUST do to show you that they care about you? For example, if they don’t give me these 3 things then that means they don’t care about me. The video CANNOT EXCEED 60 seconds, or you will automatically be disqualified.



3. IMPORTANT: Please
 us at 
 to follow the above instructions will result in automatic disqualifications.  Do not DM us or call us or contact us in any other way these will also automatically disqualify you.



ABOUT OUR COMPANY:

Achieve Integrative Health is the #1 rated Acupuncture and Wellness Clinic in the United States with over 760 five star google reviews. Our Mission is to help people restore their body’s God given ability to heal itself so that they can do what they love. Our vision is to equip and inspire one million people around the world to do what they love, when they want, with whom they want. 



WHY JOIN US?

• You’ll Achieve your Goals = our team provides all of the resources (information, training, opportunities) you’ll need to achieve all of your Professional, Financial and Personal Goals, as long as you are willing to put in the work and deliver results.



• Peace and Joy Team = we have a phenomenal culture of care for our patients and our tea
mbers. We are very strict with our rules, policies and core values in order to protect our culture of peace and joy.  Imagine being on a team where you don’t have to deal with people who talk behind your back and end up back stabbing you.  Imagine a team where all of your teammates want you to succeed in Life and they will do their best to help you achieve that.



• Be Highly Rewarded as a Side Benefit = imagine being able to do your Passion everyday and make a phenomenal living as a side benefit. The average "experienced" VAs in the Philippines/Indonesia make $5-$7 USD/hr, our entry-level VAs start off making $5/hr. We have a quarterly bonus program, where some of our tea
mbers have earned $500-$1,000USD per quarter, and this year 2025, because the team has performed so well, some tea
mbers were paid an 'additional' year end bonus of $2000-$3000 USD.



BENEFITS

• Competitive Total Compensation = $5-$12 USD/hr for graveyard shift only.

• Unlimited Opportunities for Growth = as long as you can generate more results for the company we will never limit your ability to grow within our company. Every tea
mber can also become a partner of the business if they desire.

• Other Benefits for qualified tea
mbers = paid-time off, premiu
dical insurance, Employee Savings Matching Program

• Work from Home = no more 2-4 hour commutes to work

• Wellness Initiatives = benefit from complimentary virtual health services from our medical providers, ensuring your well-being and your family’s well-being is always a priority.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

• Receive all inbound calls to close Leads wanting to receive treatments at our clinic

• Call,
, and use various communication forms to identify the validity and potential of the lead

• Receive all inbound calls to answer questions – fact find and qualify lead/route to appropriate tea
mbers

• Work with patients to ensure they are satisfied with the services provided

• Encourage happy patients to send us their success stories

• Share patient success stories during daily company meeting

• Implement our CARE system to follow-up with our patients to provide 5 star service

• Check-in and checkout patients

• Verify Insurance Benefits

• Other additional tasks may be added based on your strengths…



CHARACTER REQUIREMENTS & QUALIFICATIONS

• You must truly have a caring heart and truly want to help people improve their health, if you are mainly focused on how much money you can make, we are not the team for you

• You must speak Fluent English (ie. someone on the phone can understand what you're saying w/o straining)

• You must be organized and be able to handle multiple tasks and responsibilities everyday. If you’re looking to only do one or two tasks per day, we are the wrong team for you.

• You must be able to follow instructions exactly as written, if you don’t like reading scripts or following instructions, we are not the right team for you

• You must have a good heart. If you like to gossip behind peoples back, please don’t apply.

• You must value Results over effort. If you like to be paid based on how many tasks you completed or how much responsibilities you have, we are not the team for you. We pay ONLY based on you meeting your KPIs, metrics, quotas.

• You must sleep the same schedule 7 days a week, as this is a graveyard shift, you cannot switch back to the Philippines/Indonesian time zone on the weekends as this destroys your health. Your Health is our priority, and if you don’t value your own health we don’t want you on our team.

* if you are seeking recognition for your effort instead of recognition for exceeding your KPIs, then we are not the right team for you.

• You must be honest and have integrity. If you are caught lying, you will be immediately terminated.

• You must want to EARN your pay (ie. base salary + bonuses) instead of being given a pay (ie. focused only on base salary) that you didn’t earn.

* we are not looking for experience, we prefer candidates who have no experience, as having experience hinders your success on our team.  We are looking for character, who you are as a person. 

* we prefer candidates who do not have any medical background and do not have any degrees.  Having a degree, medical background, or virtual assistant experience will make it Harder for you to succeed on our team, as you will have to unlearn all of those things to succeed on our team.



WORKSTATION REQUIREMENTS

• You must have a separate quiet room to work in. You can not have your children or anybody else in the room that you work as your screen will be displaying confidential information, no exceptions.

• There can not be any background noise in your room when you are making phone calls.

• You will be required to provide photos of your workspace

• We will also randomly ask you to show your workspace via your webcam, and if you are caught lying you will be fired immediately.



COMPUTER AND INTERNET REQUIREMENTS:

• Fast and reliable wired internet connection of not less than 100 Mbps

• Secondary and Tertiary Back up Internet of not less than 10 Mbps

• At least one Power Station Backup

• Dual Monitor

• Intel Core i3 or higher Operating System with at least 8gb RAM

• Excellent quality headset with microphone, and a working webcam



WORK SCHEDULE:

OPTION 1 > Full-time 8:00 - 18:00 (M-Th) 8:00-16:00 (F) U.S. Central Standard Time, 2-hr lunch breaks 

OPTION 2 > Part-time 7:00-13:00 (M-F) U.S. Central Standard Time
