title: Print Estimator
description:
About the Role 



TGI Direct is looking for a detail-oriented and analytical Print Estimator to support accurate and timely job costing for print and production projects. 



This role is responsible for evaluating project specifications, calculating costs, and ensuring that estimates are aligned with production capabilities and business goals. 



This is not a task-based role. We are looking for someone who takes ownership, understands production workflows, and ensures that pricing is both competitive and profitable while supporting smooth execution. 



 



Key Responsibilities 

- Prepare accurate and timely cost estimates for print and production jobs  

- Review project specifications including materials, quantities, timelines, and production requirements  

- Collaborate with sales, production, and operations teams to clarify job details and requirements  

- Ensure estimates align with actual production processes and capabilities  

- Identify cost-saving opportunities and recommend alternative approaches when needed  

- Maintain and update pricing structures, cost models, and vendor rates  

- Work closely with vendors and suppliers to obtain pricing and availability  

- Support job setup accuracy by ensuring all details are complete before production handoff  

- Assist in improving estimation processes and standardizing workflows  

- Maintain documentation of estimates and costing assumptions  





What Success Looks Like 

- Accurate and consistent job costing with minimal pricing errors  

- Estimates aligned with real production capabilities and timelines  

- Improved profitability through well-calculated pricing  

- Reduced back-and-forth between sales and production due to incomplete or unclear estimates  

- Faster turnaround time for quotes and proposals  

- Strong collaboration between sales, production, and operations teams  





Requirements 

- Proven experience as a print estimator or in a similar role  

- Strong understanding of print production processes and materials  

- Ability to interpret job specifications and translate them into accurate cost estimates  

- Strong analytical and numerical skills  

- High attention to detail and accuracy  

- Experience working with production, sales, or operations teams  

- Strong communication and collaboration skills  

- Self-starter who takes initiative and ownership  





Nice to Have 

- Experience with PrintVis or other print/ERP systems  

- Familiarity with Microsoft Dynamics Business Central  

- Experience in direct mail or production-heavy environments  

- Experience working with vendors and supplier pricing  

 



What We’re Looking For 

- Someone who understands both pricing and production realities  

- Someone who catches missing details before they become issues  

- Someone who brings structure and consistency to estimation processes  

- Someone who can balance speed, accuracy, and profitability  

- Someone comfortable working with US-based teams and overlapping hours  





How to Apply 



Please submit your application by sending: 

- A link to your resume  

- A brief summary of your experience with print estimation  





Bonus (optional but highly encouraged): 

Briefly walk us through how you would estimate a complex print job and what factors you consider.
salary: Compensation will be based on experience

title: Customer Experience & Operations Associate (E-commerce Coffee Company) *Full Time, Remote | Long-Term Growth Opportunity
description:
Are you ready…

To start a role that motivates and excites you?

And a position where we invest in your learning, education, and growth?



Then keep reading, we want to work with you!





WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS POSITION:

This is not your typical support role — you’ll work directly with our founders, influence company-wide systems, and gain exposure to every part of the business.



Incredible company culture:

• Small, close team with collaborative, friendly and open culture.

• We believe the biggest asset of a company is our people. We focus on helping each tea
mber reach their full potential by investing in their learning, growth, skills, and education. When we grow as individuals, we succeed as a team.

• Not a fan of office politics or drama? We’re on the same page. Instead of wasting time with that, we focus on solving problems and reaching goals

• 100% remote, enjoy the comfort and flexibility of working from home



Pay, benefits, progression, and long-term growth:

• Competitive salary

• Benefits including up to 16 days a year Paid Time off

• Progression as we grow: greater responsibilities, leadership opportunities, and increased pay.

• Feel empowered, make decisions, have an impact

• Grow with the company and live up to your potential!

• Join an exciting, fast-growing company!







ABOUT US:

We’re a young, ambitious, and small (but growing!) company that’s making a massive impact in ecommerce. 



Since 2015 we’ve been obsessed with building award-winning products and awesome brands that people fall in love with. We have 2 primary brands in our portfolio: 

(1) an international award-winning coffee products brand 
 / 
).

(2) an educational coaching program that helps entrepreneurs grow their businesses to create a positive impact in the world!



Our two recent flagship products became the world’s most successful launches in their categories. We’ve shipped more than 200,000 orders worldwide and we’re continuing to expand.



Our culture is transparent and candid. You’re always welcome (and encouraged!) to ask questions or express a difference of opinion. Learning and growth is a cornerstone of our culture, both personally and professionally. We work hard, and we have fun!







WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

We’re looking for a proactive and detail-oriented team player to fill this role—someone who thrives on solving problems, staying organized, and making things run smoothly across departments.



Do you love helping customers, supporting a team, and keeping operations organized? Do you get satisfaction from making systems work better and “getting things done”? If yes, we want you on our team!



You’re probably the type of person who:

• Enjoys supporting others and finding solutions to problems

• Has strong communication and organizational skills

• Likes working behind the scenes to make sure everything runs like clockwork

• Is excited to wear multiple hats and be part of a growing, fast-moving company

• Has worked directly with founders or in a startup, and enjoys that fast-paced, flexible vibe

We’re not just looking for someone who can support our team, we’re looking for someone to be proactive with taking ownership of tasks, solve problems independently, and grow into larger responsibilities over time.







YOUR OPPORTUNITY AND ROLE ON THE TEAM:

Our culture is collaborative, friendly, and open. We hire people who are smart, ambitious, and have a strong desire to learn and grow.



Sound like you? This is an exciting long-term opportunity!



This is a fully remote position. You’ll work directly with our founders and collaborate with our small but mighty team to support customer happiness, streamline operations, and take on projects that help the business grow. 



This is a foundational role — one where you’ll gain visibility into all parts of the company.



As you grow, your role will grow with you, based on your interests and strengths:

• Want to work improving our systems and processes? Awesome!

• Have ideas on how to improve our website? Fantastic!

• Want to learn how to manage projects? Let’s go!



We’re not just hiring for a role — we’re hiring for potential. 



Your responsibilities will span 4 key areas: customer experience (30-40%), operations/logistics (20-30%), executive support (10-20%), and special projects (10-20%) — giving you exposure across the business. These percentages are estimates and you can expect your day-to-day to shift and evolve as the business grows and as you take ownership. 



1. Customer Experience

• Provide
/chat-based support for our customers across our channels (Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale)

• Answer order and product questions, resolve issues promptly, and ensure customers feel heard and supported

• Support wholesale partners with order updates, invoicing, and coordination



2. Order Management & Platform Coordination

• Manage, monitor, and troubleshoot orders across Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale channels

• Troubleshoot and resolve shipping or fulfillment issues with partners and customers

• Maintain accurate product listings, inventory data, and logistics information across platforms



3. Executive & Admin Support

• Manage founder and team inboxes, schedule meetings, and organize internal documentation

• Assist with travel bookings, meeting preparation, and note-taking

• Support small projects by tracking timelines, managing tasks, and ensuring follow-through



4. Special Projects & Company Operations

• Conduct research projects to support decision-making (tools, systems, competitors)

• Support lead generation efforts through identifying new wholesale prospects, brand partners, or influencers

• Support planning and execution of events, expos, or marketing campaigns — manage timelines, logistics, and tasks

• Document and maintain SOPs for operational clarity and training

• Test and troubleshoot web pages, workflows, or customer journeys to ensure quality and functionality

• Take ownership of ad hoc “figure it out” tasks — we’ll guide you, but we value initiative and independent problem-solving mindset



You’ll be trained on all platforms and tools, and we’ll support your learning — but we’re looking for someone who’s excited to take initiative and build systems along the way. This role evolves — as you grow, so will your responsibilities.







ABOUT YOU / REQUIRED SKILLS OR EXPERIENCE:

We value curiosity, reliability, and the ability to take ownership. If you enjoy figuring things out, learning on the job, and taking initiative, you’ll thrive here. This role is not a fit if you need constant direction or struggle to manage your own time.



Must have experience:

• 2+ years of experience in a customer service or operations support role 
/chat-based)

• 1+ years experience in eCommerce environments (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

• Fluent in written and spoken English



Key traits:

• Strong detail orientation, organizational, and time-management skills — you’re detail-obsessed and on top of things

• Proactive problem-solver — you take initiative, do the research, and follow through

• Able to work independently, ask questions when needed, and communicate clearly

• Comfortable with constructive feedback and direct, respectful communication



Optional but a big plus:

• Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus

• Experience with executive assistant work 
/calendar/travel management)

• Experience improving or documenting processes (SOPs)

• Experience at a startup or small business where you wore multiple hats

• “Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus”







PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

If this description seems like it’s too intimidating for you, this position is probably not for you. However, if you’re still here reading and this sounds exciting for you, we’d love to meet you!



The full time monthly salary will be $
based on your skills and level of relevant experience. Being a member of our team has other benefits including up to 16 days of paid time off per year.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our interview process extremely quick and efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Get started with a quick Initial Screening here for us to get to know you: 

2. Complete the screening and we’ll be in touch with next steps once we receive it.





The position is on a first come first review basis, so the sooner you complete the screening, the more likely you'll get hired.



Good luck, and we hope to have someone awesome like you to join us!

title: Senior Social Media & Marketing Manager (D2C E-commerce Coffee Brand) *Full Time | Remote (Asia Time Zone)
description:
Innovative global coffee brand inventing one-of-a-kind tools redefining how coffee is experienced. Seeking a Marketing Manager to own campaigns, launches, and cross-channel execution alongside founders.





ABOUT ICOSA BREWHOUSE:

ICOSA Brewhouse is a globally recognized specialty coffee brand redefining how coffee is experienced. We are shaping coffee culture around the world. (
  / 
 )



We design and invent one-of-a-kind tools that didn’t exist before — tools that elevate everyday rituals and introduce new ways of enjoying coffee.



From record-breaking Kickstarter launches to collaborations with world-class coffee professionals, our products are used by champions, in top cafés, and in homes in 100+ countries around the world. 



We are a design-led, innovation-driven brand operating in a niche we are actively shaping. We build thoughtfully, test deliberately, and care deeply about quality — in both product and execution.



As we continue to innovate, launch new products, and grow, we are looking for a Senior Social Media & Marketing Manager to take ownership of how our work is brought to life across channels.



You won’t just publish content.



You’ll help shape how new products are introduced, how campaigns are structured, and how our global community experiences our brand — while ensuring execution remains disciplined, consistent, and scalable.







YOUR ROLE AND OPPORTUNITY ON THE TEAM:

This is a senior marketing operator role. Execution is central — but it is not a junior content posting role.



You will work directly with our Marketing Lead to:

• Own day-to-day marketing delivery across core channels

• Structure and execute campaigns from planning through rollout

• Translate ideas into clear, executable briefs

• Coordinate creative production across internal, outsourced, and AI-assisted workflows

• Strengthen how our marketing engine operates over time



You will see early product prototypes.

You will contribute to campaign discussions before launch.

You will help shape how innovation is presented to a global audience.



Execution is central to this role — but so is judgment, ownership, and the ability to think in campaigns rather than isolated posts.





What you’ll own:



(1) Marketing Execution Across Channels

• Own social media execution (Instagram and
).

• Plan and manage content calendars aligned with brand positioning.

• Ensure consistent publishing and follow-through across platforms.

• Manage inbox and community engagement, including partnership or influencer communication if required.

• Execute
 campaigns aligned with launches, promotions, and collaborations.



You ensure marketing execution remains structured, timely, and dependable.



(2) Campaign Rollout & Launch Execution

• Support and execute seasonal campaigns, product launches, collaborations, and promotional initiatives.

• Translate marketing objectives into structured creative briefs.

• Coordinate creative asset development across designers, freelancers, and AI-supported workflows.

• Oversee cohesive cross-channel rollout so messaging, visuals, and timing align across social,
, and paid efforts.

• Strengthen campaign structure and rollout processes over time.



You think in campaigns — not just content pieces.



(3) Creative Briefing & Quality Control

• Create clear, structured briefs for design and content production.

• Maintain high standards of aesthetic consistency, messaging clarity, and brand voice integrity across both human and AI-assisted workflows.

• Draft copy or guide AI-assisted content creation when needed, ensuring outputs remain on-brand and high quality.

• Review creative outputs for brand alignment before escalation to the Marketing Lead.

• Collaborate comfortably in tools such as Figma or similar platforms to support execution and alignment.



You don’t need to be a designer — but you should have strong creative judgment.



(4) Growth & Operational Development

• Identify opportunities to refine workflows and strengthen how our marketing engine operates.

• Lead or contribute to structured testing and rollout of new channels or initiatives as capacity allows.

• Over time, take increasing ownership of campaign structuring, cross-channel coordination, partnership campaign oversight, and creative alignment across performance-driven efforts.



As you demonstrate reliability and judgment, your scope expands meaningfully.





What success looks like:

• Social and
 channels operate smoothly with consistent execution and strong brand alignment.

• Campaigns are rolled out in a coordinated, cross-channel manner without last-minute chaos.

• Creative briefs are structured, clear, and reduce friction across collaborators.

• Marketing execution no longer bottlenecks leadership attention.

• Early experiments in new channels or initiatives are tested in a structured way.



Over time, you become a trusted execution leader within the marketing team.





What This Role Is Not:

• Not a pure content creator role.

• Not a brand strategist role.

• Not a paid media buyer role.

• Not an administrative coordinator role.



This is a senior marketing operator position inside a growing global brand.







ABOUT YOU / WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

You are someone who:

• Understands how structured marketing campaigns come together.

• Can translate ideas into clear execution plans.

• Is comfortable owning delivery without hand-holding.

• Is comfortable reviewing performance data and using insights to inform execution decisions.

• Is strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



You are strategic enough to think ahead — but practical enough to execute consistently.



Must have skills or experience:

• 4–6+ years of experience managing marketing and/or social for a brand.

• Experience executing structured marketing campaigns.

• Experience within D2C or product-based brands strongly preferred.

• Comfortable operating inside e-commerce environments.

• Highly detail-oriented and disciplined in follow-through.

• Strong creative judgment and ability to assess content quality and brand alignment.

• Comfort collaborating in design tools such as Figma.

• Comfortable working directly with founders in a small, fast-moving team.



Big pluses:

• Experience supporting product launches or crowdfunding campaigns.

• Experience creating, implementing, and refining marketing processes or building SOPs.

• Experience coordinating freelancers or creative collaborators.

• Familiarity with Klaviyo or similar
 platforms.

• Exposure to AI-assisted marketing workflows.







WHY JOIN US:

At ICOSA Brewhouse, you will:

• Work directly with founders who are deeply involved in product design, positioning, and global campaigns.

• Operate close to innovation — seeing products and launches before they are introduced to the world.

• Contribute to campaigns that reach a global coffee audience.

• Have real ownership inside a small, high-performing team where your work is visible and impactful.

• Help shape coffee culture around the world.



We are a fully remote team — but we operate with structure and discipline.



You’ll be joining a close-knit group focused on building something meaningful with collaboration and accountability. There is no office politics. No unnecessary hierarchy. Just people committed to high standards.



We care deeply about growth — not just as a company, but as individuals. As we expand, there are real opportunities to take on broader ownership, lead initiatives, and shape how our marketing evolves.



If you want a role where:

• Your ideas are heard.

• Your execution matters.

• Your scope can grow with your capability.

You will feel at home here.







COMPENSATION AND WORKING STRUCTURE

Full time: 40 hours/week 

Compensation range: $1,100-$1,800 (based on relevant experience and demonstrated capability)

Up to 16 days of paid time off annually

Asia time zone working hours required







HOW TO APPLY

Are you ready? 



If you’d like to join us on our journey and grow together with us, we’re looking forward to meeting you.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our application process extremely efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Complete the quick application: 
 

2. In the first question of the application start it with: "I’m (insert your name) from (insert your city/town) and my favourite food is (insert your favourite food). Then introduce yourself and why you think you’ll be a good fit for this position. 

3. We’ll be in touch with next steps for the interview once we receive it. 



We look forward to reviewing your application.

title: E-commerce Graphic Designer – Join Our Creative Team!
description:
Job Title: E-commerce Graphic Designer – Join Our Creative Team!

Are you a designer who understands that a great image isn't just "pretty"—it's a sales tool?

We are a growing Amazon-focused team looking for a high-level Graphic Designer to join our creative department. You won’t just be "making graphics"; you’ll be crafting the visual identity of brands and creating high-converting Amazon listings that stand out in a crowded marketplace.

We are looking for a long-term partner, not a one-off freelancer. If you want to be part of a team where your work is valued and your creative input is actually heard, keep reading.

Your Mission:

Amazon Listing Mastery: Design "Main Images" that grab attention, plus Infographics and Lifestyle images that explain product benefits instantly.

A+ Content & Storefronts: Build beautiful, cohesive Brand Stories and EBC (Enhanced Brand Content) layouts that drive conversions.

Creative Problem Solving: Take a raw product photo and turn it into a premium-looking asset through expert retouching and manipulation.

Brand Consistency: Work alongside another Designer and Team Lead to ensure every brand we manage has a consistent, professional "vibe."

Efficiency: Manage multiple projects simultaneously without sacrificing quality.

The Skillset We Need:

Expert Level: Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator are your best friends.

The "Amazon Eye": You understand Amazon’s technical requirements (white backgrounds, aspect ratios) and what makes a customer stop scrolling.

Independence: You can take a creative brief and run with it, though you’ll check in with the Team Lead for feedback.

Communication: We believe in over-communication. You’ll be expected to provide updates on your progress throughout your shift.

Portfolio: You MUST have a portfolio that showcases e-commerce or product-focused design.

Schedule & Compensation:

Hours: Full-time (40 hours/week).

Shift: 5:00 PM – 1:00 AM Philippine Time (This is crucial for real-time collaboration with the rest of our team).

Starting Pay: P40,000 per month.

The Future: Just like the rest of our team, we offer a path for steady pay increases as you become a core part of our agency’s success.

Why Work With Us?

No Micro-management: We trust our experts. You’ll have the freedom to be creative.

Collaborative Environment: You’ll be working with a Team Lead and another Designer who "speak your language."

Stability: We are building something big. We want you to grow as we grow.



How to Apply:

We value attention to detail. Please follow these steps exactly:

Subject line: "Creative Rockstar Found - [Your Name]"

Provide a link to your Portfolio (Be sure it includes product-related work!).

Tell us: What is the most important element of an Amazon "Main Image" to ensure a high click-through rate?

Confirm you are available for the 5 PM – 1 AM PHT shift.

Applications that meet this requirement will be scheduled for interviews.

title: Customer Support Assistant - Call Handling Focus
description:
Monster Group (UK) Ltd is a thriving UK-based online retailer offering a diverse range of high-quality, great-value products to customers worldwide. We are looking for our next “Monster” to join our growing team and help deliver customer service that is truly out of this world.



This is a fully remote position based in the Philippines, offering an exciting opportunity to work with a successful British ecommerce company.



You will be required to log in remotely and work during UK office hours (Monday–Friday, 8:00am–5:30pm GMT) to maintain clear communication with the team. Occasional weekend work may be required.



Candidates must also have a quiet, private workspace suitable for handling professional phone calls and maintaining confidentiality while working from home.



Key Responsibilities:

-Respond to customer queries via
, ticketing systems, and phone calls in a friendly and professional manner

-Confidently and creatively resolve customer issues across a wide range of products within agreed timescales

-Send invoices and provide relevant information to customers

-Liaise with courier companies and use online portals to resolve delivery-related queries

-Dispatch orders and ensure online marketplaces remain up to date

-Answer marketplace enquiries and monitor customer feedback

-Maintain accurate records and follow internal processes to support smooth daily operations



Requirements:

-Proven experience handling customer phone calls within an ecommerce environment is essential

-Previous experience in customer support within an ecommerce company

-Experience with marketplaces such as Magento, Amazon, and eBay is a strong advantage

-Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

-Friendly, professional, and discreet when handling company and customer information

-Highly organized with exceptional attention to detail

-Ability to multitask and manage multiple priorities effectively

-A valid passport is required. This is a crucial access requirement for the role.



If you are reliable, detail-oriented, and comfortable working UK hours, we would love to hear from you. Join us and become part of a dynamic and supportive ecommerce team.

title: MS Dynamics / Business Central Developer
description:
About the Role 



TGI Direct is looking for a skilled and detail-oriented MS Dynamics / Business Central Developer to support and enhance our internal systems and business processes. 



This role is responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining solutions within Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central to improve efficiency, visibility, and scalability across the organization. 



This is not a task-based role. We are looking for someone who takes ownership, understands business needs, and proactively builds solutions that simplify and streamline operations. 



 

Key Responsibilities 

- Design, develop, and customize solutions within Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central  

- Build and maintain extensions using AL and related technologies 

- Collaborate with internal teams (operations, finance, sales) to understand business requirements and translate them into system solutions  

- Integrate Business Central with other systems and tools (e.g., CRM, third-party platforms)  

- Troubleshoot and resolve system issues, bugs, and performance concerns  

- Maintain data integrity and ensure system reliability  

- Support system upgrades, testing, and deployment processes  

- Document technical processes, workflows, and system configurations  

- Continuously identify opportunities to improve and automate business processes  





What Success Looks Like 

- Efficient and reliable Business Central system supporting daily operations  

- Reduced manual work through automation and system improvements  

- Well-documented and scalable system architecture  

- Smooth integrations between Business Central and other platforms  

- Fast resolution of system issues and minimal downtime  

- Improved visibility into business data and processes  



Requirements 

- Proven experience working with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central  

- Strong experience in AL development and extensions  

- Understanding of ERP systems, business processes, and data structures  

- Experience with integrations (APIs, web services, third-party tools)  

- Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

- Strong communication and collaboration skills

Nice to Have

- Familiarity with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Planner etc.)  

- Experience in operations-heavy or production environments  

- Background in finance, supply chain, or ERP implementations  

 



What We’re Looking For 

- Someone who takes ownership and thinks beyond just development tasks  

- Someone who can simplify complex processes through smart system design  

- Someone who is proactive in identifying gaps and improving workflows  

- Someone comfortable working with US-based teams and overlapping hours  

 

How to Apply 

Please submit your application by sending: 

- A link to your resume  

- A link to any relevant project work or portfolio (if available)  



Bonus (optional but highly encouraged): 

Briefly describe a Business Central solution or automation you’ve built and the impact it had on the business.

title: Freelance Property Brochure Designer
description:
Luxury Property Marketing | Project Based Role



We are a premium UK property brand looking for a highly skilled freelance designer to produce beautifully designed property brochures.



This is a project based role, not a full time position. Each time we launch a new property we will require a brochure to be designed using our existing design style and layout system.



The ideal candidate is someone who understands luxury presentation, typography, and print design, and who can consistently deliver work at a very high visual standard.



About The Ivybridge Collection



The Ivybridge Collection is a premium estate agency specialising in exceptional homes across Norfolk and Suffolk.



Our marketing focuses on cinematic presentation, high quality photography and magazine quality brochures. Our printed brochures are an important part of how we present properties to buyers.



We already have established brochure styles. Your role will be to take these existing designs and adapt them for new properties.



Role Overview



For each property we market you will receive:



• Property description text

• Professional photography

• Floorplans and property details



Your task will be to design a high quality property brochure using these materials while maintaining our established design style.



Attention to detail, layout balance and typography are extremely important.



Design Quality Expectations



Our brochures should feel closer to a high end lifestyle magazine than a basic property leaflet.



Important characteristics include:



• Elegant typography

• Clean, spacious layouts

• Careful image placement

• Consistent branding

• Strong visual hierarchy



We are looking for designers who understand luxury presentation and premium print design.



Required Software Skills



You must be comfortable using professional design software such as:



Adobe InDesign

(preferred for brochure design)



Adobe Photoshop



Adobe Illustrator



Responsibilities



You will:



• Design property brochures based on our existing style

• Arrange images, text and floorplans in a clean layout

• Maintain consistent branding across all brochures

• Ensure all typography and spacing is precise and professional

• Prepare final files for high quality printing



Required Outputs



Each completed brochure must include:



• High resolution print ready PDF

• Correct bleed and crop marks

• CMYK colour profile suitable for professional printing

• High resolution images correctly placed and scaled



In some cases we may also request:



• A web friendly PDF version for online viewing



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



• Has strong experience designing brochures or magazines

• Understands luxury branding and layout design

• Has excellent attention to detail

• Communicates clearly and reliably

• Can work efficiently when new properties launch



Experience in property marketing, luxury brands or editorial design would be highly beneficial.



How This Role Works



This is a freelance gig role.



When a new property launches we will send the materials and brief, and you will design the brochure for that property.



Typically each brochure is between 12 and 24 pages depending on the property.



We expect turnaround times of approximately 2 to 5 days depending on complexity.



To Apply



Please include:



• Examples of brochure or magazine design work

• Examples of print ready design projects

• The software you use for layout design



Applications without portfolio examples will not be considered.



Important



Please begin your application with the words:



Luxury presentation matters



This helps us filter automated responses.

title: LEASING ASSISTANT
description:

We’re looking for a dedicated Leasing Assistant to join our team. We pride ourselves on delivering outstanding service, strong operational support, and fostering a collaborative and professional work environment.

- Guide prospects through the lease application process to ensure a seamless experience.

- Once leases are signed and payments are confirmed, coordinate move?in dates with prospects and property managers.

- Prepare and generate basic reports related to lead activity, leasing performance, and key metrics.

Job Requirements

- Experience working with CRM systems (Yardi is a plus)

- Strong communication and follow-up skills

- Highly organized and detail?oriented

- Ability to manage multiple leads efficiently

description:

Posts will be highlighting my listings (most home listings will have one post each week and land listings one post every other week, need weekly post promoting my brand/my business/my team. Some of the posts can be recycled (ex: listings will sometimes be a branded template but the wording may change)

title: Social Media Manager
description:
We sell professional pressure washing and soft washing equipment online. We need someone to run our social media presence across all platforms — TikTok, Instagram,
, YouTube, and LinkedIn.



This is not a "schedule some posts and disappear" role. You'll be the voice of our brand online — engaging our community, writing copy that converts, building relationships with influencers in the cleaning industry, and coordinating with our video editor to distribute content strategically.



You'll own:

— Posting strategy and content calendar across all platforms

— Captions, copy, and hashtag strategy for every post

— DMs, comments, and community engagement (you are the front line)

— Influencer and affiliate outreach in the pressure washing / home services space

— Coordinating with our video editor on content scheduling and distribution

— Proposing strategy, getting approval, then running it independently



The goal: Brand awareness + community of pressure washing contractors + driving traffic and sales to our site. You need to understand all three and know which lever to pull when.



Think Duolingo, Gymshark, Judy's Family Cafe — brands that lead with personality, not product specs. If you don't know who these are, this probably isn't the right fit.



Ads coordination: You'll work closely with our ads manager to ensure paid content hits as hard as our organic. That means reviewing ad creative before it goes live, making sure the copy and visuals match the voice and standards we've built organically, flagging what's working in organic that could be turned into a paid ad, and sharing audience insights from your community engagement that can sharpen ad targeting. You don't run the ads — but you're the quality filter and the bridge between what our audience responds to organically and what we put dollars behind.



On AI: We expect you to use AI tools on the job to move faster and work smarter — that's a plus, not a problem. But during the hiring process, we need to see YOUR thinking. Every response, every Loom, every answer should be 100% your own brain. We're hiring a strategist, not a prompt engineer. If we sense AI-generated answers in your application or communications, you're out. We need someone who can think originally and uses AI to enhance their output — not replace it.



Don't apply if you think social media management is just scheduling posts, you can't write engaging copy on the fly, or you've never grown and engaged a real community.



To apply, include ALL of the following:



1. A short Loom video (2 min max) — pick any brand in the cleaning, trades, or home services space and break down what they're doing right and wrong on social media.

2. Links to social media accounts you've managed or grown (with context on what you did).

3. Name 3–5 brands or creators you follow for social media inspiration and why.



Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed.

title: Ecommerce Assistant
description:
Run operations for a fast-growing e-commerce brand — and grow with us. We're looking for one exceptional VA to own our day-to-day and build something real.



ABOUT THE POSITION:



You'll be the operational backbone of our business and take ownership over your domain of work.

You'll handle everything from customer communication and supplier coordination to QuickBooks invoicing, product research, Shopify catalog management, and documentation creation. You'll also manage our social media presence (~1 hour daily), keeping our brand active and engaging across platforms. You'll manage timelines, track tasks, anticipate needs, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.

In 6 months, you'll likely be managing a small virtual team and taking on higher-level operational projects. In 12 months, you could be leading entire operational domains with significantly higher compensation.



What You'll Actually Do



- Support daily operations across customer service, vendor coordination, and order management

- Manage product sourcing, procurement research, and catalog updates (Shopify, Amazon, eBay)

- Handle QuickBooks invoicing and transaction support

- Manage social media accounts — daily posting, engagement, and community management (~1 hour/day)

- Coordinate team communication, track hours, and manage internal workflows

- Create and maintain SOPs, documentation, and process systems

- Use tools like Notion, ShipStation, Google Workspace, Clockify, and BitWarden

- Anticipate problems before they happen and solve them before they're asked

- Handle whatever else needs handling—because in a growing company, priorities shift fast





Who You Are

Non-Negotiables:

- 2+ years of virtual assistant experience (ecommerce experience is a major plus)

- Exceptional English — writing, speaking, and comprehension at a native or near-native level

- Available to work EST business hours full-time (40 hrs/week)

- Proactive critical thinker — you don't wait to be told what to do

- Relentless problem solver — "no" is just the beginning of the conversation

- Highly intelligent and detail-obsessed — nothing gets past you

- Outstanding customer service skills — you communicate with clarity and care

- Social media savvy — you know how to create engaging content and build community



What Sets You Apart:



You've used QuickBooks, Shopify, or ecommerce platforms before

You've managed social media for a business (not just personal accounts)

You're tech-savvy and learn new tools quickly

You thrive in fast-paced environments where no two days are the same

You take ownership like it's your own business

You want to be challenged, not coddled





Why Work Here?



Most VA jobs treat you like a task robot. We treat you like a strategic partner.

- Growth Path: Manage a team within 6 months. Grow your responsibilities and compensation as you prove yourself.

- High-Caliber Team: Work alongside sharp, driven people who will push you to level up.

- Real Impact: Your work directly affects business outcomes. You'll see the results of your decisions.

- Investment in You: We want to develop your skills, challenge your thinking, and help you become exceptional at what you do.

- Meritocracy: Performance = opportunity. We reward excellence, not seniority.



Details



Schedule: Full-time (40 hours/week), EST business hours

Compensation: $5.50/hour - $8.00/hour USD depending on experience

Location: Remote (Philippines-based candidates only)

Start Date: ASAP



Applicants must score in the 90th percentile or higher on the test below to be considered for the position. If you are a high caliber professional who has what it takes, we want to work with you! The test takes about 30 minutes and we are willing to pay for excellence.

title: Part-Time Shopify E-Commerce Manager
description:
PART-TIME SHOPIFY E-COMMERCE MANAGER

Soft Wash Technologies | Remote | ~10 hrs/week |$5.50 - $7.50 /hour



You know what a great Shopify store looks like — and more importantly, you know what a broken one looks like.



We sell pressure washing and soft washing equipment to professional contractors across the US. Our store is the business. When it's sharp, clear, and easy to buy from, contractors trust us. When it's not, they leave.

We're looking for one person to own the site.





A TYPICAL WEEK LOOKS LIKE THIS:



You log in, check the store, and notice the homepage banner is still promoting last month's sale. You swap it. You see a product description that reads like a spec sheet — you rewrite it so a contractor actually understands why they need it. You check Microsoft Clarity and spot that mobile visitors are dropping off on a collection page. You dig in and fix it. You publish a blog post you've been working on that targets a keyword you found during research. You update two FAQ answers that were outdated. You resize and optimize a few product images that were loading too slow.

Then you hop over to our Amazon and eBay listings — we only cross-post a handful of products there, but you make sure the inventory counts match, the images look right, and the descriptions aren't stale. It's not a huge lift, but if something's off, you catch it.

That's the job. Nobody tells you to do most of this. You just see it and handle it.





YOU'LL USE:



Shopify (daily), Amazon Seller Central, eBay Seller Hub, Canva, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Microsoft Clarity, Notion, and GoHighLevel (we'll train you on GHL).





YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF:



You've actually managed a Shopify store — not just "set one up once." You've touched Amazon or eBay seller accounts enough to keep listings clean and accurate. You write product copy that sounds like a human talking to another human, not a keyword-stuffed robot. You can do basic image editing without being asked. You understand on-page SEO well enough to do it, not just talk about it. And you don't need someone checking in on you every day to make sure the work got done.





TO APPLY:



Take a look at 
. Send us a short message that includes one specific thing you'd change on the site and why. Include a link to a Shopify store you've worked on, or screenshots.

That's it. No novel. No generic cover letter. Just show us you looked.

title: Video Editor

— Trend identification (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

— Editing raw footage into scroll-stopping short-form video

— Tracking analytics and using data to d
 what we make next

description:

title: Estimator | Construction (Commercial Fitout) - URGENT!!
description:
Construction & Projects Virtual Assistant (Commercial Fitout)



Sydney-Based Construction Business | Recruited by Paul Group Virtual



Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time

Industry: Commercial Fitout & Construction

Start Date: ASAP



*MUST HAVE THE BELOW SOFTWARE AND AUSTRALIAN ESTIMATING EXPERIENCE*



About the CLIENT:

Our client is a Sydney-based commercial fitout contractor delivering high-quality projects across office, hospitality, healthcare, and education sectors. They are a structured and commercially disciplined business with a strong pipeline of repeat clients, focused on accuracy, risk management, and delivery excellence. Due to continued growth, they are seeking a Construction & Projects Virtual Assistant to support the Director and project team.



The ROLE:

This role provides direct support to the Director and project team, with a strong focus on tenders, drawings, scope reviews, and documentation control. You will play a key role in ensuring accuracy, organisation, and smooth project coordination.



This is a support role — not responsible for pricing decisions or client negotiations.



Key Responsibilities



1. Estimating & Tender Support

* Review and organise drawings, specifications, and consultant documents

* Measure and assess scope of works from drawings

* Assist with quantity take-offs and scope validation

* Populate BOQs and Excel templates

* Review tenders for accuracy

* Assist in compiling and submitting tender packages

* Coordinate subcontractor pricing follow-ups

* Maintain tender trackers, summaries, and checklists

* Project & Documentation Support

* Maintain organised digital filing systems for tenders and live projects

* Track deadlines, submissions, and RFIs/clarifications

* Assist with contract and project documentation

* Ensure proper version control of drawings and documents

* Support coordination between estimating, project, and site teams



2. Director & Team Support

* Assist with admin tasks, scheduling, and follow-ups

* Prepare reports, summaries, and trackers

* Monitor action items, risks, and deadlines



3. What You Will NOT Be Responsible For

* Client Negotiations

* Final tender pricing or margin decisions

* Commercial commitments

* Developing pricing strategies or methodologies





Non-Negotiable Requirements

* Proven hands-on experience with Bluebeam

* Proven hands-on experience with BuildSoft

* Strong experience reviewing construction drawings and tenders

* High attention to detail in scope measurement

* Advanced Excel skills (BOQs, trackers, spreadsheets)

* Proficiency in
 and Google Workspace

* Background in construction, fitout, estimating, or project admin



Applications without Bluebeam and BuildSoft experience will not be considered.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

* Experience in commercial fitout projects

* Exposure to projects valued between $500K – $5M

* Experience supporting estimators or project managers

* Familiarity with BOQs, take-offs, and subcontractor coordination





Why Join

Long-term, stable role

Work directly with an experienced Director

Clear structure and expectations

Fully remote role with an Australian company

Strong opportunity for growth





How to Apply!!!



Please include:

* Your hourly rate (AUD)

* Confirmation of Bluebeam and BuildSoft experience

* List of construction/project systems used

* Relevant work examples (tender support, estimating admin, documentation, Excel schedules, etc.)

title: Product lister for Shopify
description:
Only apply by submitting:

 • A Loom video showing your work

 • A link to your product page



Applications without both will not be considered.



?



About the role:



We are looking for a Shopify product lister who understands how to correctly import and structure products for a US-based store.



You must be familiar with:

 • Shopify

 • Poky (for importing products)

 • Kiwi Size Chart (for adding size tables)

 • ChatGPT (for generating size charts)



?



What you need to do (test task):



You will receive a product from us.



Your task is to:

 1. Import the product into your own Shopify store

 • You can use a demo store or your own store

 • Use Poky or a similar tool

 2. Create a complete and clean product page



?



Product page requirements:



Product title & URL:

 • Keep the product name clean and correct

 • Adjust the product URL so it includes the product name + product type



Product description:

 • Keep the description as close to the original as possible

 • Only:

 • Fix spelling errors

 • Remove strange wording

 • Remove any references to other brands, stores, or countries

 • Do not rewrite or change the structure



Images:

 • Check all product images

 • Remove duplicates or incorrect images

 • Make sure nothing looks inconsistent or unprofessional



Background consistency (only if needed):

 • If product images have different background colors (e.g. light grey and dark grey), adjust them so they match

 • If images are already consistent, do not change anything



Size chart (REQUIRED):

 • Create a size chart using ChatGPT

 • Add it using the Kiwi Size Chart app (not in the description)

 • The size chart must be clickable on the product page and open correctly



Size chart structure must be EXACTLY:

 • Column 1: US Size

 • Column 2: EU Size

 • Column 3: Inches

 • Only inches allowed (no cm)



Extra requirement:

 • If the product has multiple colors, add this line at the bottom of the description (italic):

Buy two colors and get 10% extra off



?



Pricing requirements (VERY IMPORTANT):

 • Always use a compare-at price (original price)

 • The compare-at price must be a clean, rounded number

 • Standard discount range:

 • Between 70% and 79%

 • However, pricing must make sense:

 • Do not create unrealistic discounts

 • Example: if a sandal sells for $50, do NOT set compare-at price to $200

 • Adjust logically based on product type and market price

 • The final pricing must look realistic and trustworthy



?



Important:

 • Store is focused on the USA market

 • Do not include any non-US information

 • Keep everything clean, consistent, and professional



?



How to apply:



Send:

 1. A Loom video showing:

 • How you imported the product

 • How you built the product page

 • How you added the size chart

 2. A link to your product page



Only candidates who complete this task correctly will be considered.

description:
Full-time position | Paid part-time onboarding for the first 30 days at the same rate



Hey, I'm Paul Swider — CEO of RealActivity, a Boston-based healthcare AI company. I'm looking for a sharp, organized assistant who loves Microsoft 365 and wants to work closely with a CEO in a fast-moving environment.

This isn't a traditional admin role. You'll be a real partner — helping me stay on top of my sales pipeline, prep for important meetings, keep the CRM clean, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks. If you're the kind of person who automates the boring stuff before anyone asks you to, we'll get along great.



What you'll actually be doing:

Keeping my leads and opportunities organized in Dynamics 365 — drafting outreach, scheduling follow-ups, and researching prospects before I talk to them

Preparing agendas and briefings before meetings; capturing notes and action items after

Managing my calendar and coordinating with the team in Teams and Loop

Building simple Power Automate flows to eliminate repetitive work

Polishing presentations, proposals, and templates

Pulling together a weekly pipeline snapshot so I always know where things stand





What you need to bring:

Solid Microsoft 365 skills — especially Power Automate, Outlook, Excel, and Teams

Comfort with AI tools (Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to work faster and smarter

Strong written English — you'll be drafting things that go out under my name

The ability to work independently and stay organized without being chased



Dynamics 365 experience is a plus, but if you're a fast learner who picks up new systems quickly, that's fine too.



What to expect:

This is a full-time role. The first 30 days are a paid part-time onboarding period — same hourly rate, fewer hours — so we can both make sure it's the right fit before going all in. After that, you're full-time with high visibility, direct access to the CEO, and real room to grow as we do.



To apply, just tell me:

How you use Microsoft 365 day-to-day (especially Power Automate)

One example of how you've used AI to save time or improve a workflow

How you'd approach managing a CEO's lead pipeline

Your availability and hourly rate



Thank you,

Paul

title: Social Media & Digital Marketing
description:
We are looking for an experienced Virtual Assistant / Social Media Assistant to support our marketing activities across multiple platforms. This role is ideal for someone creative, analytical and highly organised who can both create engaging content and optimise advertising performance.



Key Responsibilities:

-Create engaging social media posts across platforms including
, Instagram, LinkedIn, Pinterest and others

-Plan and schedule content using a structured social media calendar

-Design graphics for social media, magazines, adverts and marketing materials

-Edit and produce short-form marketing videos

-Manage and optimise Meta advertising campaigns

-Analyse advert performance data and provide clear reporting and insights

-Continuously test and improve advert performance to maximise results and ROI

-Monitor trends and suggest creative ideas to improve engagement and reach

-Engaging and posting in group forums



Skills & Experience Required:

-Proven experience managing Meta Ads Manager and analysing advertising performance

-Strong understanding of social media marketing strategies

-Experience creating high-quality graphics and marketing materials

-Video editing skills for short promotional videos and social media content

-Experience using design tools such as Canva, Adobe Suite or similar

-Ability to interpret data and optimise campaigns

-Strong communication and organisation skills

-Experience across multiple social media platforms



Desirable:

-Experience designing magazines, brochures or marketing publications

-Knowledge of UTM tracking, pixels and campaign optimisation

-Experience in lead generation campaigns



What We Are Looking For:

-Someone creative but data-driven

-Highly reliable and organised

-Able to work independently and proactively

-Someone who can bring new ideas and improvements

title: Creative Graphic Design Executive
description:
Make Your Mark in Design, Lead Creativity, and Contribute to Our Vision.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Creative Graphic Design Executive to join our creative team and play a pivotal role in crafting high-quality, visually stunning designs that enhance our brand presence. If you are a creative powerhouse proficient in Adobe Illustrator with a keen eye for design, we want you to help bring our vision to life.



This is a hands-on, dynamic role ideal for a creative professional passionate about design and eager to make an impact on a fast-growing company. You’ll collaborate with leadership, work on high-priority assignments, and ensure the seamless execution of design projects that elevate Hadley Designs' brand.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand committed to shaping brighter futures through creativity and purposeful design. We create screen-free learning tools that spark curiosity, build confidence, and transform everyday 
nts into meaningful growth. Each product is hand-drawn, crafted with input from teachers, parents, and child development experts, ensuring learning is joyful, engaging, and accessible.



Our mission is simple: to help families and educators unlock children’s potential with tools that inspire curiosity, strengthen connections, and support learning without screens. Trusted by over two million customers worldwide, we are passionate about designing experiences that make children feel supported, capable, and excited to learn.



If you’re looking for a company that designs with purpose and builds with heart, apply here:

title: Customer Support Manager Ecommerce
description:
We are looking for a Customer Support Manager to oversee our growing Customer Support Team for our online store. This is a long-term role with real responsibility. You will be the main point of contact for our support agents and ensure that all customer inquiries are handled efficiently, accurately, and with the highest level of professionalism.



Your main responsibilities will include:



Acting as the first point of contact for our customer support team when they have questions or need assistance.



Learning our products, workflows, and support templates thoroughly in order to guide the team.



Training and onboarding new support agents as our team grows.



Reviewing and managing all return requests:



Support agents will add return cases to a shared list.



You will verify them, approve or reject requests, and process refunds to customers.



Monitoring support performance to ensure speed, accuracy, and quality of responses.



Helping improve our templates and processes over time to increase efficiency.



Escalating issues to management when needed and keeping communication clear.



Leadership Requirements:

We need someone who has already managed a team in the past. This is not an entry-level role. You must be confident in leading people, making decisions, and showing authority.



When mistakes happen, you identify the root cause, fix them immediately, and ensure they never happen again.



You think ahead, work proactively, and keep the team focused on solutions instead of excuses.



You show power, discipline, and leadership – the team must trust and follow you.



Future responsibilities may include:



Scheduling shifts and ensuring full coverage across the week (including weekends).



Creating performance reports and KPIs for the support team.



Handling exceptional or high-priority customer cases directly.



What we expect from you:



Proven experience in customer support management, e-commerce service, or team leadership.



Strong organizational and communication skills.



Ability to train and coach tea ---------- mbers effectively.



High level of responsibility, trustworthiness, and attention to detail.



Good English communication (German is not required – translations and templates are provided).



Proactivity: You don’t just react, you solve problems and improve processes.



Why this role is important:

You will ensure that our support team runs smoothly and that customers always get fast, professional, and accurate solutions. By managing returns and refunds carefully, you also protect the company from mistakes and keep customers happy.

title: 3D Visual Content Designer
description:
About Mirage Paris: 



At Mirage Paris, we redefine the world of luxury fragrance. We don’t just sell perfumes — we craft sensory experiences that merge emotion, design, and innovation. As our brand continues to grow, we are seeking a Visual Content Creator to elevate our product presentation through hyper-realistic mockups, 3D imagery, and AI-driven visuals. This role replaces traditional photoshoots with scalable, high-end digital artistry.



What This Role Is About



We already have our physical products — now we need exceptional visuals that capture their premium essence and highlight their unique ingredients. Using AI tools, 3D rendering, or your own creative approach, you’ll bring our products to life through compelling visuals that inspire and convert.



You will:



Create hyper-realistic product mockups (bottles, packaging, backgrounds, lifestyle scenes) using AI or 3D tools



Design ingredient-based and emotional visuals that express each fragrance’s character — freshness, warmth, sensuality, or depth



Replace traditional photoshoots with modern, digital-first visual assets



Refine and iterate based on our brand identity and creative direction



What We’re Looking For



Proven experience with AI-based design tools (Midjourney, DALL·E, Photoshop AI, etc.) or 3D software (Blender, Cinema 4D, Adobe Dimension, etc.)



Strong understanding of visual storytelling and emotional brand expression



Ability to replicate and elevate a luxury aesthetic consistently



Comfortable working remotely with fast feedback and iteration cycles



Bonus: Experience with fragrance, skincare, or other premium lifestyle brands



What You’ll Deliver



10–20 high-quality visuals per month (initial scope, flexible)



Mockups including packaging, branding, and lifestyle context



Ingredient-rich imagery (such as citrus, florals, spices, or woods) in refined compositions



Optional: short motion assets or GIFs for digital use



How to Apply



Please share the following:



Your portfolio (mockups, 3D, or AI-based work preferred)



The tools and platforms you use



Your rate and availability



A few lines about how you would visually bring a Mirage Paris perfume to life

title: Creative Ad Designer – Social Media Campaigns
description:
Brand: Mirage Paris – 



Mirage Paris is a fast-growing luxury fragrance brand.

We are seeking a Creative Ad Designer to help us craft premium ad visuals for Meta and TikTok.

Your work will focus on high-quality static image ads and minimalist motion animations that reflect our luxury aesthetic.



What This Role Is About:

You will design digital ads that communicate our brand identity through refined layouts, smooth motion, and tasteful transitions.

We are looking for someone who understands both the performance and design aspects of visual marketing.



Responsibilities:



Develop ad creatives for paid campaigns in square and vertical formats



Combine product imagery, textures, and typography into polished visuals



Animate product slides, text reveals, and subtle zoom/pan movements



Adapt designs into different versions for testing and scaling



Keep visuals aligned with Mirage Paris’ premium tone



Requirements:



Strong design background (Photoshop, Canva, or similar tools)



Experience with motion-based ad creation



Excellent eye for composition, spacing, and color balance



Self-organized and deadline-oriented



Details:



Remote, full-time role (40 hrs/week)



Weekly payments and long-term collaboration



Please include your portfolio showcasing previous ad design work and short-form animations.

title: Ad Creative Designer – Luxury Perfume Brand
description:
Brand: Mirage Paris – 



We are a fast-growing luxury perfume brand seeking a creative and reliable Ad Creative Designer to join our team full-time.



Your main focus will be on designing high-quality static image ads and simple animated video ads for platforms like
, Instagram, and TikTok.

This role does not involve filming or voiceovers — it’s all about creating elegant motion animations, stylish text reveals, and smooth visual storytelling through design.



???? Responsibilities



Design ad creatives in both 1080x1080 (square) and 1080x1920 (vertical/story) formats



Create premium static image ads using product photos, textures, and refined typography



Produce simple animated video ads featuring:



Text reveal animations



Subtle zoom and pan movements



Smooth slide transitions



Product highlight animations with elegant motion



Adapt and optimize creatives into multiple variations for A/B testing



Maintain a consistent luxury brand identity across all visuals



Collaborate closely with our creative team to develop and improve new ad concepts



???? Requirements



Strong graphic design skills (Canva or Adobe Photoshop)



Experience with light video animation tools (CapCut, Canva Animator, Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar)



A strong eye for composition, typography, and color harmony



Reliable, organized, and able to meet deadlines consistently



Understanding of minimalist and luxury brand aesthetics is a strong plus



? Working Hours



Full-time: 40 hours per week



Long-term role with growth potential



???? Compensation



$4.00 – $5.00 per hour, depending on skill and experience



Paid weekly



???? What We Offer



Stable, long-term collaboration with a growing international brand



Clear creative direction and feedback



Friendly and professional communication



Opportunity to evolve creatively as the brand expands



If you believe this role fits your skill set, we’d love to see your work.

Please include examples of your previous static ad designs and animated social media ads so we can get a sense of your style.

title: Sales Appointment Setters
description:
Job Title: Appointment Setter – U.S. Advertising Sales

Company: Universal Media X (UMX)

Start Date: Immediate

Job Type: Part-Time, 1-Week Trial Sprint

Compensation: $3.50 USD/hour + $20.00 per verified sales appointment

Dialer Provided: No – you must have and use your own dialer

Leads Provided: Yes

Script Provided: Yes



Job Overview



Universal Media X (UMX) is hiring experienced appointment setters to call business leads and book verified sales appointments with decision-makers for our U.S. advertising platform.



UMX places branded TV content and advertising inside restaurants, bars, lounges, and hospitality venues. We are looking for strong callers who can sound confident, professional, and persuasive on the phone while following our script and securing real appointments.



This is a fast-moving 1-week paid trial for immediate start. Top performers may be kept on for ongoing work.



What You Will Do

Cold call business leads provided by UMX

Use our script to introduce our advertising platform

Speak with owners, managers, and decision-makers

Generate interest and schedule sales appointments

Submit accurate appointment details

Record call results clearly

Send brief daily updates on activity and results

Important



Each appointment setter will focus on one assigned vertical only during the trial period.



Target verticals may include:



Car dealerships

Med spas

Real estate companies and brokers

Mortgage companies

Law firms

Cosmetic dental

Higher-end local service businesses

Requirements

Proven cold calling or appointment setting experience

Strong spoken English

Professional and convincing phone presence

Experience speaking with U.S. businesses preferred

Must have your own dialer

Must have reliable internet and headset

Must be able to start immediately

Must be comfortable working under daily performance review

Compensation

$3.50 USD per hour

$20.00 USD per verified sales appointment

What Counts as a Verified Sales Appointment



An appointment will only be paid if all of the following are true:



It is with a real business

It is with a real decision-maker or authorized manager

The business fits the assigned target vertical

The appointment details are accurate

The business is in our target market

The prospect understands the appointment is about UMX advertising

UMX verifies the appointment directly with the company



Only after UMX confirms the appointment with the company will it count as a paid appointment.



What Does Not Count



The following will not qualify for appointment bonus pay:



Fake appointments

Duplicate appointments

Wrong contact appointments

Unconfirmed appointments

Prospects who deny agreeing to the meeting

Appointments outside the target market

Appointments outside the assigned vertical

Low-quality or misleading calendar fills

Voice Recording Required



All applicants must submit a short sample voice recording with their application.



This is required so we can evaluate:



clarity

confidence

professionalism

persuasiveness

tone

how natural you sound on a live sales call



Applicants with stronger, more convincing phone delivery will have a better chance of being hired.



Voice Recording Instructions



Please submit a 30 to 60 second voice recording that includes:



your name

a brief professional introduction

a sample cold call opening to a business owner or manager



Example:



“Hello, this is [Your Name] calling for Universal Media X. We help businesses advertise through premium TV placement inside popular restaurants, lounges, and hospitality venues. I’m reaching out to see who would be the best person to speak with about local advertising opportunities in your area.”



Important: Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.



What to Include in Your Application



Please send:



your appointment setting or cold calling experience

industries you have called before

the dialer you use

your timezone and available hours

a 30 to 60 second voice recording

your recent results in appointment setting

Trial Period



This is a 1-week paid trial sprint. Strong performers may be offered continued work after the trial.



Final Note



This is a results-driven role. We are looking for people who can book real, verified sales appointments, not just make calls.



Only apply if you have real experience booking U.S. business appointments by phone and are comfortable being judged on verified results.

title: Marketing Online Campaign Manager
description:
KidsUnited is one of the fastest-growing youth enrichment franchise systems in the country. As we scale from 50 to 300+ locations, we are building a modern marketing engine designed to drive consistent, high-quality lead generation across every market.



We are looking for an individual to own and optimize our core paid digital growth channels. This role is ideal for someone who lives and breathes all things digital to stay one step ahead of the ever-changing media landscape—a person who loves getting their hands dirty and thrives on solving challenges.



This data-driven marketer thrives in execution, understands how to scale paid media, and enjoys turning performance insights into measurable business impact.



The Role:



You will lead the day-to-day performance of our paid media channels (Meta, Google, TikTok & Programatic), manage platforms, and help us scale what’s working across a rapidly growing footprint.



Key Responsibilities:



 - Own performance of paid media channels (Meta, Google, TikTok & Programatic), including budget allocation, optimization, and testing

- Drive lead volume and efficiency across all locations

- Manage and hold external platform partners accountable to performance goals

- Build and maintain performance reporting and dashboards

- Analyze results by market, campaign, and cohort to identify opportunities for growth

- Partner cross-functionally on CRM, lead flow, and conversion optimization

- Provide input on creative strategy based on performance data



What We’re Looking For:



- 3–5 years of experience in digital or performance marketing

- Proven experience managing and optimizing paid media campaigns (Meta + Google + TikTok required)

- Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate data into action

- Experience in multi-location, franchise, or high-growth environments preferred

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, build-as-you-go environment



Why This Role:



This is an opportunity to step into a high-impact role at a company scaling rapidly, where your work will directly influence growth across of hundreds of locations.

title: AI SYSTEMS ARCHITECT (Automation + Internal Tools)
description:
About Us:



We’re Biohackn, a Dubai-based premium wellness and longevity company.

We sell and install high-end recovery tech (infrared saunas, cold plunges, red light therapy, hyperbaric systems).



We are now aggressively building AI-driven systems to:



Automate operations

Increase sales efficiency

Build internal tools

Scale content and marketing



We are looking for someone who can turn manual work into automated systems.



Role Overview

This is not a basic AI assistant role.



You will act as:

AI Systems Architect / Automation Operator



Your job is to:



Analyze how we currently operate

Identify inefficiencies

Build systems that automate and improve workflows



If you enjoy building systems that save time, increase revenue, and remove repetitive work—this is for you.



Core Responsibilities



1. Automation & Workflow Systems

Build automations using tools like Zapier / Make

Connect platforms via APIs & webhooks

Automate repetitive tasks across sales, ops, and marketing



Example:

Meta lead ? auto WhatsApp ? qualify ? book call ? log into CRM ? notify sales team



2. AI Agent Development

Build AI workflows using OpenAI / Claude APIs

Create multi-step AI agents with logic, memory, and conditions

Improve prompts and system outputs over time



Example:



AI lead qualifier

AI follow-up system

AI internal assistant for the team



3. Internal Tool Building

Create simple internal apps/tools for the team



Using tools like:

Retool / Bubble / Softr / Glide



Examples:

Deal tracking dashboard

Lead management tool

Internal reporting system



4. CRM & Sales Automation

Set up and optimize CRM workflows



Tools may include:

HubSpot / GoHighLevel / Close CRM

WhatsApp automation (Twilio / WATI)



Examples:

Automated follow-ups

Lead scoring

Sales alerts for high-intent leads



5. Data & Dashboarding

Track key business metrics:

Lead sources

Conversion rates

Time to close

Build dashboards for visibility



6. Content & Marketing Automation

Automate content workflows



Examples:

Podcast, clips, captions,scheduling

Blog generation (SEO pipelines)

Content repurposing systems

Bonus Skills (Strong Advantage)



If you have these, you will stand out immediately:



Web scraping (competitor research, lead generation)

AI video tools (Arcads, Veo, etc.)

SEO automation systems (blog pipelines)

Knowledge base systems (structured memory like Claude workflows)

Experience building multi-agent systems

Experience working with fast-growing startups



Required Experience

Proven experience building real automation systems

Strong understanding of APIs, webhooks, integrations

Experience with AI tools beyond basic prompting

Ability to think in systems, not just tasks



Important

We are NOT looking for:



Basic ChatGPT users

Virtual assistants

People who only write prompts



How We Work

Fast-paced

Results-focused

You will be given ownership, not micromanagement

We care about outcomes, not hours



Compensation

Competitive (based on experience)

Long-term opportunity for the right person

Performance-based growth



Test Task (MANDATORY)

To apply, answer this:



How would you build this system:

Meta lead form ? automatic WhatsApp message ? qualify the lead ? book a call ? log data into a dashboard ? notify sales team



Explain:

Tools you would use

Step-by-step flow

Any improvements you would add



How to Apply

Start your application with:

“SYSTEMS > TASKS”



Then include:

Examples of systems you’ve built

Tools you’ve used

Loom/video explaining one automation you created (if available)



Final Note

This role is for someone who wants to:

Build real systems

Work directly with a founder

Create leverage using AI



If that’s you—we want to hear from you.



My Advice (off the record)

When you post this:

You’ll get 50+ trash applications

3–5 decent ones

1 killer



Your job is to spot the one who:

Thinks in systems

Talks clearly

Has actually built things

title: Credit Dispute Specialist
description:
Now Hiring: Credit Dispute Specialist

Are you detail-oriented, confident on the phone, and passionate about helping clients improve their credit? We’re seeking a Credit Dispute Specialist to join our team and manage the full lifecycle of client disputes—from reviewing credit reports to submitting dispute letters and tracking outcomes.



This role goes beyond typical credit repair: you’ll be filing disputes with the Big 3 credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion) and with regulatory and oversight bodies such as CFPB, BBB, ATG, and FTC. You’ll be the key point of contact for clients throughout the dispute process, ensuring accurate, timely resolutions while maintaining exceptional client communication.



If you thrive in a structured, process-driven environment and want to make a real impact on people’s financial lives, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities:

- Credit Dispute & Account Management

- Review client credit reports to identify inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable items

- Prepare, submit, and track dispute letters with the Big 3 credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)

- File disputes and complaints with CFPB, BBB, ATG, and FTC

- Monitor dispute timelines and follow up to ensure timely resolution

- Analyze bureau, creditor, and regulatory responses for accuracy and compliance

- Keep clients updated on progress and next steps

- Maintain detailed records of dispute activity and outcomes



Administrative & CRM

- Maintain accurate client data in CRM systems (Go High Level & CRC preferred)

- Assist with general administrative tasks related to credit repair



What We’re Looking For

- 1–2 years of hands-on experience in credit repair or credit disputes

- Proven experience in appointment setting or client outreach (credit repair experience preferred)

- Strong knowledge of credit reporting, dispute processes, and relevant laws (FCRA, FDCPA)

- Experience filing disputes with credit bureaus and regulatory agencies (CFPB, BBB, ATG, FTC) a plus

- Professional phone and written communication skills

- Ability to manage multiple client accounts independently

- Detail-oriented, dependable, and self-motivated

- CRM experience (Go High Level preferred)



How to Apply: To be considered, please submit:

- Your CV/Resume link

- A 1-minute video introduction

- Your family birth order (Eldest, Middle, Youngest)



 Subject Format: Credit Dispute Specialist – [Your Name]_[Birth Order]

?? Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.
