title: Senior Video Editor
description:
We're hiring a Senior Video Editor to help produce Andrew's Reviews — a fast-growing Amazon Influencer brand that creates in-depth product review videos to help shoppers make confident buying decisions.



Our content includes long-form YouTube reviews, product demonstrations, side-by-side comparison tests, and unboxing — all designed to educate, entertain, and convert viewers into buyers.



Find us here:

• YouTube: 

• Amazon Storefront: 

• TikTok: 



________________________________________

ABOUT ANDREW'S REVIEWS

________________________________________



We produce authentic, conversion-focused content showcasing everyday Amazon products — from kitchen tools to smart home gadgets. Your editing is a core reason why viewers trust us. We're building for the long term, and this role grows with you.



________________________________________

WHAT YOU'LL DO

________________________________________



As our Senior Video Editor, you'll own the post-production process end to end and help raise the standard for the wider editing team.



Responsibilities:

• Edit long-form YouTube review and comparison videos from rough footage to final export — cuts, color, audio, motion graphics, and captions

• Build and maintain branded templates, lower thirds, intros/outros, and transition kits

• Collaborate directly with Andrew and Team on pacing, structure, and creative direction for each video

• Work efficiently through 4K footage pipelines without sacrificing quality or turnaround time

• Use AI-assisted tools (ChatGPT, Descript, OpusClip, etc.) to accelerate rough cut and repurposing workflows

• Provide clear, constructive critique to junior editors and assist with their training and development as needed

• Review thumbnail concepts and provide editing-informed feedback on click-worthiness

• Manage file organization, project archives, and delivery timelines across multiple concurrent videos

• Track hours and productivity using Hubstaff (required upon hire)



________________________________________

QUALIFICATIONS

________________________________________



Required:

• 3+ years editing YouTube or creator content professionally

• Expert-level in DaVinci Resolve, Adobe Premiere Pro, or Final Cut Pro

• Fast and efficient with 4K footage — you don't let a heavy timeline slow you down

• Strong sense of pacing — you know when a cut is 2 seconds too long

• Experience editing product demos, reviews, or comparison formats

• Comfortable with AI editing tools (Descript, OpusClip)

• Ability to give clear, actionable feedback and mentor junior editors

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Reliable internet (100 Mbps+ upload and download) and a capable 4K editing workstation

• At least 1 hour overlap in EST for check-ins and training (7PM PHT)



Nice to Have:

• Experience with Amazon Influencer or affiliate-focused content

• Short-form editing experience (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

• Motion graphics skills in After Effects or Fusion

• Understanding of YouTube retention analytics and thumbnail strategy

• Familiarity with 
 or similar review/delivery platforms

• Experience coordinating within a small content team



________________________________________

COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

________________________________________



• $900–$1,200 USD/month, depending on experience and skills

• 13th Month Pay

• Annual merit raise and performance-based bonuses

• 3 paid sick days, 2 PTO days, and paid Philippine holidays

• Full-time (40 hours/week), renewable contract

• Flexible working hours

• Long-term position with growth opportunities



________________________________________

HOW TO APPLY

________________________________________



Please submit the following (ALL REQUIRED):

1. Resume

2. Portfolio — YouTube channel or editing samples (links preferred)

3. Computer specs screenshot (system info clearly visible)

4. Internet speed screenshot: https://www.speedtest.net

5. Personality Test result: 
/test/big-five-personality-test

6. IQ Test result: 
/tests/FSIQ/

________________________________________



Keywords: Senior Video Editor | DaVinci Resolve | Premiere Pro | Final Cut Pro | YouTube Editor | Amazon Influencer | 4K Video Editing | Product Review Content | Remote Video Editor | Creator Economy | Descript | OpusClip | Content Repurposing

We produce authentic, conversion-focused content showcasing everyday Amazon products — from kitchen tools to smart home gadgets — designed to educate, entertain, and convert viewers into buyers. We're a small, focused team building for the long term, and we want someone who grows with us.



________________________________________

HOW THIS ROLE WORKS — 30-DAY PAID TRAINING PERIOD

________________________________________



All new hires begin with a paid 30-day training period. This is your opportunity to learn our systems, workflows, and standards — and for us to see how you work. At the end of the 30 days, we'll make a final hiring decision based on your performance, reliability, and fit with the team. Candidates who complete training successfully move into the full-time role.



________________________________________

WHAT YOU'LL DO

________________________________________



Core Responsibilities (required from day one):

• Organize and manage raw video footage and project files

• Upload and publish content across platforms (Amazon, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, etc.)

• Schedule and manage social media publishing calendar

• Respond to social media comments and messages

• Reporting, documentation, and general admin tasks

• Miscellaneous tasks: calendar management, personal research, etc.



Learn and Grow Into (training provided):

• Product research using AI tools

• Video and content editing support using AI tools (ChatGPT, OpusClip)

• Social media marketing and campaign management to drive growth

• Brand outreach and management



________________________________________

QUALIFICATIONS

________________________________________



Requirements:

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive — this is the most important quality we're looking for

• Comfortable using AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Canva) or eager to learn

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Reliable internet (minimum 100 Mbps download / 100 Mbps upload) and a capable computer

• Must install Hubstaff for time tracking and productivity monitoring

• Available for at least 1 hour overlap during U.S. Eastern Time for daily check-ins (7PM PHT)



A Plus (not required):

• Any prior experience as a Virtual Assistant or working with US-based clients

• Experience working with influencers, brands, or Amazon sellers

• Familiarity with video editing tools (CapCut, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Descript, etc.)

• Experience with content scheduling platforms or spreadsheets



________________________________________

COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

________________________________________



• $400 a month during 30-day training period.

• $520–$600 USD/month starting salary

• 13th Month Pay in December (pro-rated if hired mid-year)

• Paid Philippine holidays after training period (1 month)

• Full-time (40 hours/week), renewable contract

• Flexible working hours

• Long-term position with growth opportunities



________________________________________

WORK HOURS

________________________________________



• 40 hours per week (Full Time)

• Flexible schedule with 1-hour required overlap during U.S. Eastern Time for daily sync (7PM PHT)



________________________________________

HOW TO APPLY

________________________________________



Please submit ALL of the following with your application and cover letter to be considered:



1. Screenshot of your computer specs (system info clearly visible)



2. Screenshot of your internet speed from https://www.speedtest.net



3. Complete these 3 free assessments and submit screenshots + links as instructed:



   • Big Five Personality Test

     Link:  
/test/big-five-personality-test

     Include: Screenshot with result and visible URL



   • IQ Test (FSIQ)

     Link: 
/tests/FSIQ/

     Include: Screenshot of the final result page with the unique result URL visible, and paste the full URL in your message



   • 16 Personalities Test

     Link: 
/free-personality-test

     Include: Screenshot with result type and Personal Test Results URL



4. A short cover message introducing yourself, including:

   • Why you're a great fit for this role

   • Any experience working with influencers or brands

   • Tools and software you're familiar with (e.g., Amazon, Canva, spreadsheets, CapCut, Final Cut Pro, etc.)



5. Resume with prior work history (if applicable)

title: Acquisition Specialist – Elite Cold Caller & Solo Closer
description:
Acquisition Specialist – Elite Cold Caller & Solo Closer



(Single-Owner Pipeline | Zero Excuses | Pure Performance)



STOP.

Do not apply unless you are a proven, solo operator in high-volume outbound calling and direct closing. This is a role for disciplined producers only—no safety nets, no split roles, no tolerance for excuses.



About the Role



You will single-handedly drive the full acquisition cycle for distressed real estate deals (tax delinquent, inherited, title/condition problems, etc.). From the very first cold call to contract close, you are the only point of accountability—there are no handoffs, no account managers, no backstops.



Your success is measured daily, weekly, and monthly on three objective, transparent metrics:



Live cold call conversations (not just dials)



Qualified pipeline growth and management



Signed contracts (closed deals)



What You’ll Own



100+ Live Cold Call Conversations Daily: Only logged, real, two-way sales conversations count.



Immediate Qualification or Disqualification: No endless nurturing, no “relationship farming”—you work a fixed, black-and-white criteria set and move fast.



Full-Cycle Sales Execution: You negotiate, contract, and close each deal yourself. No one picks up your slack.



Total CRM Discipline: Every interaction, every note, every deal status tracked in real time—no exceptions.



Zero Tolerance for Missed Metrics: All activities and results are tracked, audited, and enforced daily. Fall short = out.



Who Thrives Here



Verified, high-output cold callers AND full-cycle closers (in real estate or equivalent asset class)



Transparent metric-sharers: You can instantly reference your highest daily call volume and your annual closed deals—with proof



Obsessed with documentation, accuracy, and pipeline hygiene



Crave direct, tough feedback; you adapt quickly and don’t personalize rejection



Perform best when pay is 100% tied to measurable output—no base, no cap, no politics



Immediate Disqualifiers



Missing resume or no metrics on call/deal volume



No voice memo or not following voice memo instructions (see below)



History of shared pipelines, team selling, or reluctance to own the entire sales process



Any record of missed quotas, weak reporting, or resistance to feedback



How to Apply (Strictly Enforced)



Resume: List outbound + closing experience with specific metrics:



Highest daily call volume



Total deals closed annually



Voice Memo (2-3 min, unscripted):



Your name, location, and highest ever cold call day



Brief story of a tough/distressed deal you closed: your steps and outcome



Your exact method for tracking calls, pipeline, and follow-up



The hardest feedback you’ve received—and what you changed after



Why you want an all-in, solo, performance-only sales seat



Any missing step = instant disqualification.



Do Not Apply If:



You don’t have both outbound and closing experience (with numbers)



You want ongoing “culture,” hand-holding, or daily coaching



You dislike strict process, documentation, or number-driven reviews



You prefer collaborative, shared, or “team” sales environments

title: Eligibility & Prior Authorization Specialist
description:
About NY Arthritis Clinic



NY Arthritis Clinic is a leading rheumatology and musculoskeletal care practice committed to delivering exceptional, patient-centered treatment to individuals living with arthritis and related conditions. Our team is dedicated to removing barriers to care — and we need a highly experienced authorization specialist to help make that happen.





Position Overview



We are seeking a seasoned Eligibility & Prior Authorization Specialist to join our remote team. In this critical role, you will manage the full prior authorization lifecycle for both medications and procedures, verify patient insurance eligibility, and serve as a key point of contact for patients, providers, and insurance carriers. Strong phone communication skills are essential — this role requires consistent, professional, and high-volume phone interaction on a daily basis.



Key Responsibilities



- Initiate, track, and follow up on prior authorization requests for specialty medications (including biologics, DMARDs, and infusion therapies) and clinical procedures

- Verify patient insurance eligibility and benefits prior to appointments and treatments

- Communicate directly with insurance carriers, pharmacy benefit managers (PBMs), and specialty pharmacies to obtain timely approvals

- Answer inbound calls from patients and providers professionally and efficiently — **phone coverage is a core and non-negotiable function of this role**

- Make outbound calls to insurance companies and pharmacies to expedite authorizations and resolve denials

- Manage and document all authorization activity accurately within the EHR/practice management system

- Coordinate peer-to-peer review requests between physicians and insurance medical directors

- Identify and escalate urgent or time-sensitive authorization needs to the appropriate clinical staff

- Support the appeals process for denied authorizations, including gathering clinical documentation and drafting appeal letters

- Stay current on payer-specific requirements, formulary changes, and CMS guidelines



Requirements & Qualifications



- Minimum **5 years of experience** in prior authorization, insurance verification, or medical billing — specialty or rheumatology experience strongly preferred

- In-depth knowledge of Medicare, Medicaid, and commercial insurance authorization processes

- Experience with specialty medications including biologics (e.g., Humira, Enbrel, Rinvoq, Xeljanz) and infusion therapies highly desirable

- Familiarity with ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS coding as they relate to authorization requirements

- Proficiency with EHR systems (experience with athenahealth, Epic, or Modernizing Medicine a plus)

- Exceptional phone etiquette and verbal communication skills — comfortable managing high call volumes with professionalism and patience

- Strong written communication skills for appeal letters and payer correspondence

- Highly detail-oriented with the ability to manage multiple open authorizations simultaneously

- Self-directed and able to work independently in a fully remote environment

- Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet, dedicated home workspace required



NY Arthritis Clinic is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace where all tea
mbers are valued and respected.

title: Klaviyo Email Marketer - POOLING
description:
GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where smart ideas turn into real impact.

We build and scale online brands across international markets, and we empower our tea
mbers to take ownership, grow quickly, and shape the future of our business alongside us.





Important Note: Talent Pool Role



This position is currently for talent pooling purposes. While we may not have an immediate opening, we are actively building a pipeline of strong
 Marketing Specialists for upcoming growth initiatives.



We will still proceed with our initial HR screening and interview process, and shortlisted candidates will be contacted once a role officially opens.







Why This Role Exists

 is one of the most profitable and scalable channels in eCommerce and we believe it should be treated as a revenue engine, not just a support channel.



As a Klaviyo
 Marketing Specialist, you’ll directly contribute to increasing revenue across our eCommerce brands by improving and scaling our
 flows and campaigns. Your work will have a measurable impact on company profitability and long-term growth.



This role is for someone who wants to build, optimize, and scale — not just send newsletters.





What You’ll Own & Build

In this role, you’ll be trusted with real responsibility from day one. Your success will be measured in your first 90 days based on the following metrics:

- Increasing revenue generated from
 marketing by at least 25%

- Building, optimizing, and scaling high-performing automated flows (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, win back, etc.)

- Launching strategic campaigns that drive engagement and repeat purchases

- Running consistent A/B tests on subject lines, creatives, segmentation, and offers

- Using data insights to continuously refine performance and reporting results clearly





We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has at least 2 years of
 marketing experience in eCommerce

- Has hands-on experience with Klaviyo (Required)

- Has experience working with Shopify (nice to have)

- Has a strong creative mindset and solid copywriting skills

- Is analytical, performance-driven, comfortable taking ownership and working in a fast-paced environment

- Thinks in terms of revenue impact, not just open rates







Portfolio Requirement

Your portfolio is a strong requirement for this role.

Applications without a proper portfolio will automatically be tagged as rejected.



Please:

- Do not reuse your resume as a portfolio

title: HIRING! Google Media Buyer (High-budget eCommerce experience only)
description:
This is NOT an entry-level role.

We are only considering experienced eCommerce performance marketers who have managed large product catalogs and high monthly ad spend.





Help scale brands. Own performance. Drive real revenue.

GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where great ideas don’t sit in slides — they turn into real, measurable growth. We build and scale online brands across international markets, and our tea
mbers take real ownership, grow fast, and help shape the future of the company.



We’re now looking for a performance-driven Google Ads Media Buyer to help take our main revenue channel to the next level.





Please Do NOT Apply If:

- You have never managed $300K+ per month in Google Ads spend

- You have not handled Google Shopping for 10,000+ SKUs

- Your experience is mostly lead gen or small-budget accounts

- You rely on basic campaign setups without deep feed optimization

- You are not comfortable being accountable for revenue performance



We respect your time — and ours.





Why This Role Is Critical

This role plays a meaningful part in the growth of the company.



As a Google Ads Media Buyer, you’ll directly contribute to improving the performance of our Google Ads channel, which drives around 90% of our total revenue, while developing your skills in a performance-driven environment. You’ll help elevate our campaign structure, strategy, and overall account performance, ensuring our ad spend translates into scalable and profitable growth.



This role is ideal for someone who wants to fully own the performance of an account, build systems that improve efficiency, and drive measurable business impact.



What You’ll Own 7 Build

In this role, you’ll be trusted with real responsibility from day one. Your success will be measured in your first 90 days based on the following metrics:

- Developing and implementing a new or improved Google Ads strategy

- Restructuring and optimizing Google Shopping and PMAX campaigns for better scalability and efficiency

- Driving measurable performance improvements that result in a 20%+ increase in revenue from Google Ads

- Taking full ownership of Google Ads accounts, including campaign structure, bidding strategy, and feed optimization

- Building automation systems, scripts, or workflows that improve campaign efficiency and reduce manual work

- Using data insights to continuously refine bidding strategies, segmentation, and feed performance



What We’re Looking For

We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has 3+ years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads for eCommerce

- Has direct experience managing large Google Shopping accounts (10,000+ products)

- Has personally managed Google Ads accounts end-to-end, including strategy, optimization, and performance analysis

- Has experience handling high-budget campaigns ($300K+ monthly ad spend)

- Is comfortable owning and managing accounts independently (excluding creative production)

- Has experience building or implementing automations (scripts, feed rules, automation workflows, or similar tools)

- Has strong expertise in Google Ads, Google Merchant Center, and Google Analytics

- Ideally has experience with Google CSS Labelizer

- Thinks analytically, enjoys testing and optimizing campaigns, and is comfortable being accountable for revenue impact



Only apply if you meet the above requirements. We’re building a high-performance team, and this role requires proven experience with large-scale eCommerce campaigns.



Hiring Process

Shortlisted candidates will complete a 19-minute Google Ads knowledge assessment to validate hands-on expertise before moving to the HR interview.



Ready to Make an Impact?

If you’re someone who loves ownership, thrives on measurable results, and wants your work to matter, we want to hear from you.

title: Print Vis Project Manager
description:
About the Role 



TGI Direct is looking for a highly organized and proactive PrintVis Project Manager to lead the implementation, optimization, and management of our PrintVis system. 



This role is responsible for aligning PrintVis with our actual production, sales, and operational workflows to improve visibility, coordination, and efficiency across the organization. 



This is not a task-based role. We are looking for someone who takes ownership, understands both systems and operations, and can drive structure across teams while ensuring PrintVis supports how the business truly operates. 





Key Responsibilities 

- Lead the implementation and ongoing optimization of PrintVis within the organization  

- Translate business processes (sales, production, scheduling, fulfillment) into PrintVis workflows  

- Collaborate with internal teams (sales, production, operations, leadership) to gather requirements and align system usage  

- Ensure accurate job setup, tracking, and workflow visibility within PrintVis 

- Identify gaps, inefficiencies, and opportunities for automation within the system  

- Coordinate with stakeholders to improve handoffs between sales and production  

- Support data accuracy, reporting, and system integrity  

- Provide training and guidance to internal teams on proper system usage  

- Document workflows, processes, and system configurations  

- Act as the main point of contact for PrintVis-related initiatives and improvements  





What Success Looks Like 

- PrintVis is fully aligned with actual production and operational workflows 

- Clear visibility of job status across all stages (from sales to production to delivery)  

- Improved coordination between sales, scheduling, and production teams  

- Reduced errors and rework due to incomplete or unclear job information  

- Increased efficiency through streamlined processes and automation  

- High adoption and correct usage of PrintVis across teams  



Requirements 

- Proven experience with PrintVis (required)  

- Strong background in project management, operations, or ERP system implementation  

- Understanding of print production workflows (digital, press, bindery, fulfillment, shipping)  

- Experience working with cross-functional teams (sales, operations, production)  

- Strong process improvement and problem-solving skills  

- Ability to translate business needs into system workflows  

- Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills  

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail  

- Self-starter who takes initiative and ownership  







Nice to Have 

- Experience with Microsoft Dynamics Business Central  

- Experience in print, direct mail, or production-heavy environments  

- Familiarity with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot)  

- Experience with workflow automation tools (e.g., Power Automate)  

- Experience leading system implementations or transformations  





What We’re Looking For 

- Someone who can bridge the gap between systems and real-world operations  

- Someone who brings structure and clarity to complex workflows  

- Someone who proactively identifies inefficiencies and solves them  

- Someone who can drive alignment across teams and improve communication  

- Someone comfortable working with US-based teams and overlapping hours  





How to Apply 



Please submit your application by sending: 

- A link to your resume  

- A brief summary of your experience with PrintVis or similar ERP systems  





Bonus (optional but highly encouraged): 

Briefly describe a system or workflow you implemented or improved and the impact it had on operations.
salary: Compensation will be based on experience

title: Customer Support Specialist - Ecommerce
description:
Customer Support Specialist - Ecommerce

— Remote | Full-Time | Philippines Only 

— $850 - $1,100 USD/month 

— 6AM - 2PM PHT / 6PM - 2AM PHT



At most eCommerce brands, support agents are treated like ticket machines.



You're handed a pile of canned responses and told to blast through the inbox as fast as possible.



Apologising for problems you flagged to the team months ago. 



Nobody cares if the customer actually felt helped. They care that you hit your numbers.



Here, it's different.



Yes, we move fast. But never at the expense of making a customer feel genuinely heard.



You'll have the tools to work efficiently - but more importantly, you'll have the trust to use your own judgment. 



Your thinking matters here. Your voice matters here.



So if you're someone who:

— Takes pride in writing
s that make customers say "wow, that was actually helpful"

— Wants to work for a brand that does something meaningful

— Thrives in fast-paced startups where you can grow



This role was built for you.





About Us



We're a wellness brand helping parents navigate their children's health.



These aren't casual purchases. When a parent reaches out, they're often worried, confused, or frustrated. 



A lazy response can shatter their trust. But a thoughtful, empathetic reply? That turns a one-time buyer into a lifelong advocate.



Most eCommerce companies treat support as a cost to minimize. We treat it as the heartbeat of our brand.





The Role: What You'll Own



You'll manage our inbox with speed, empathy, and precision - reporting directly to our Customer Support Team Lead.



1. Inbox Mastery

Handle high-volume inbound
s with clarity and care. Every
 you send represents our brand.



2. Problem Solving

Don't relay information. Investigate, find the real answer, then deliver it in a way that puts the customer at ease.



3. Tone Advocacy

Maintain a warm, parent-to-parent tone that matches our brand voice. Know the difference between "technically correct" and "actually helpful."



4. Feedback Loop

You're our eyes and ears. When the same issue keeps surfacing, flag it and help us fix the root cause.





What We're Looking For



We're not looking for the fastest copy-paster. We need someone who can think, write, and genuinely care - all at the same time.



Must-Have Experience:

— 2+ years in Customer Support 
). eCommerce startup experience strongly preferred.

— Impeccable grammar and the ability to explain complex things simply.

— Familiar with helpdesk software (Gorgias, Zendesk) and eCommerce platforms (Shopify).

— A master of keyboard shortcuts and macros but knows exactly when to ditch the template and write something personal.

Must-Have Attributes:

— Empathy First - Calm and kind even when the inbox is on fire. You don't just respond. You make people feel heard.

— Startup Speed - Process changes don't throw you off. They energize you.

— Self-Starter - You see a gap, you fill it. You see a problem, you flag it. No hand-holding needed.

— Detail-Obsessed - A missing tracking link, a slightly off tone, a typo in a parent's name. You catch what others miss.





Compensation & Perks



Total Potential Compensation: $850 – $1,100 USD/month

— Base Salary: $850 USD/month

— Performance Bonus: Up to $250 USD/month, based on KPI performance and team contribution



Growth Path:

— Customer Support Team Lead - Mentor agents, oversee operations, shape support strategy.

— Social Media / Community Management - Transition into public-facing brand engagement.



We're a startup. When we grow, you grow. And we're growing fast.



Perks:

— 100% Remote - Work from wherever you're most productive

— 20 Days Paid Time Off per year

— HMO Coverage after 3-month probationary period

— Professional Development - Workshops, training, and certifications

— Small Team = Big Impact - Your work is visible, your voice matters, your ideas get heard





Our Hiring Process

No surprises. Here's exactly how it works:

1. Submit Your Application (linked below)

2. Loom Video Introduction

3. Technical Assessment

4. Interview with Customer Support Team Lead



We're building the #1 customer experience in the wellness space and we need someone who treats every
 like it matters.

If you're ready to do work that makes a difference, with a team that cares as much as you do - hit apply.

title: Junior Media Buyer (Search Arbitrage / RSOC)
description:
We are looking for a data-driven Junior Media Buyer with hands-on experience in Search Arbitrage (SARB) to join our growing team. This role is ideal for someone who already understands the fundamentals of RSOC-compliant advertising, search arbitrage traffic flows, and performance optimization. We are looking for a candidate who can analyze data, execute structured testing, and help scale profitable campaigns while maintaining compliance with platform policies.





? Requirements

Experience working with budgets over 5k daily with positive 18% Ro



Solid understanding of campaign structure (CBO/ABO), creative testing frameworks, and campaign optimization and scaling strategies



Strong analytical mindset and ability to work with performance metrics on a daily basis (CTR, CPC, EPC, CPA, ROAS/ROI



Experience working with Google Sheets (formulas, data analysis, reporting) and performance dashboards



Ability to analyze campaign data, identify trends, and make optimization decisions independently



High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple campaigns and vertical tests simultaneously



Strong time management, fast adaptation to changes and ability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment



Fast execution speed while maintaining accuracy



Experience with automation rules and campaign performance monitoring



Understanding of creative fatigue, angle testing, and vertical validation in Search Arbitrage environments





???? Responsibilities

Execute structured testing of verticals, creatives, and GEOs



Ensure all campaigns and creatives comply with RSOC policy guidelines



Monitor key performance metrics daily (CTR, CPC, EPC, CPA, ROI)



Identify campaign performance drops and diagnose root causes



Optimize campaigns to improve profitability and traffic quality



Scale winning campaigns using controlled scaling strategies



Maintain accurate daily performance reporting and tracking



Collaborate with the creative team to produce RSOC-compliant ads and angles



Support vertical discovery and ongoing testing initiatives



Daily Report to Team Lead 





???? What We Offer



Competitive salary based on experience ????



Opportunities for professional development and career growth ????



Paid training, courses, and webinars ????



Remote work environment ????



Generous PTO and holidays ????



Supportive team culture focused on performance and learning ????

title: Content Specialist & Video Editor
description:
Do you love video editing and want to grow your career in content creation?



We're looking for talented video editors who are ready to take on a bigger role as a Content Specialist.



In this role, you'll do more than just edit. You’ll be trained on our internal systems to create short-form captions using AI, schedule social media posts through our platform, and manage content workflows for your assigned client.



We are a content agency, and we often repurpose longer-form videos for YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikToks, as well as audiograms and graphics for social media. We also edit their raw videos for YouTube and edit podcast episodes as well.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Edit short-form and long-form content (YouTube, Reels, TikTok, podcasts)

Use our AI captioning system to create short-form captions

Schedule content to automatically post inside our proprietary platform

Follow creative direction and provide consistent, high-quality execution

Participate in weekly training sessions to continually improve your skills



Who We’re Looking For:



Professional experience with Adobe Premiere, After Effects, or similar tools

Strong eye for motion design and storytelling

Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage your time independently

Positive attitude and willingness to receive feedback

Excellent communication skills and a self-starter mindset

Comfortable learning new tools and systems



What We Offer:



Guaranteed client placement upon successful training

Monthly salary of $700 to $1,000 USD paid directly by the client

Weekly training and ongoing support

100% remote work



If you're interested, please respond with the subject line "It's Me You're Looking For" and include a link to your work. Tell me why we should hire you!

title: Digital Ad Specialist
description:
Join Festive Lighting Pros as a Virtual Digital Ads Specialist! 



Location: Virtual (Philippines-based)

Type: Full-Time or Part-Time, Remote

Salary: $4-5/hour, commensurate with experience



At Festive Lighting Pros, we Illuminate Joy by transforming homes and businesses with stunning holiday and permanent lighting solutions. With over 1,200 projects and 15 franchises across the U.S., we’re seeking a talented Digital Ads Specialist from the Philippines to join our remote team and drive our seasonal marketing campaigns to new heights!



What You’ll Do

title: L2 Tech Support Engineer
description:
Dear Technology Lover!

We're a small (but VERY efficient) 20-year-old MSP based in Arizona.

As a small company. we're VERY employee-focused, and believe that our tea
mbers are our MOST IMPORTANT ASSET!



Here are some of the things you can expect from working with us:

• Ongoing (monthly) manager review and feedback- you should never guess where you are "standing" and what you, AND THE COMPANY, can do better!

• Paid certifications- we will pay for your courses, and tests and allocate time during business hours to help you achieve your desired goals

• Paid Time Off- it's important to us that you are happy, healthy, and have a work-life balance!

• Bonuses- when the company wins- you win!

• Raises- As we grow, we believe you should as well. We have to stay competitive as an employer to retain our awesome employees!

• Opportunities to grow- In our industry, we can't be on "cruise control"... We need to push our tea
mbers to stay ahead of the technology curve. Help you continually to sharpen your skills with a focus on your career aspirations.

• Paid sick days- We understand life happens. We don't want you to feel that you have to drag yourself to work sick if your body tells you to relax...



You're the right fit if you:

• LOVE learning, working with, and experimenting with new technology

• Get excited when you save someone's day and provide great service

• Are a hard-working fun person, and see yourself being in the IT industry for the foreseeable future

• Want to work in a GROWING environment, with STABLE income, Bonuses, and a great attitude!

• Want the opportunity to advance and learn more!



Some of the responsibilities that your position will include are:

Helpdesk (mostly escalations, but some basic if needed), cyber security related tasks/ audits, cloud hosting and virtualization (HyperV, SonicWall, VPN), MS365 management and automation, BCDR (Axcient), networking (Unifi, Sonicwall), IT projects, Servers maintenance (Windows only), scripts creation, testing new technology and other tasks related to IT.



IMPORTANT:

This position requires AT LEAST 2 years of MSP experience and at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory, or lead role. 100% clean background check, highly organized, technologically savvy, and can work diligently with little 
veral hiring steps will take place to verify the above requirements, including reference checking, employment verification, technical testing, and more.



Minimum technical level that you will need to be able to pass a test on:

• Explaining to a non-technical person what the "cloud" is

• Consulting with a new client on what BCDR solution you would recommend to an SMB, and why

title: Credentialing Coordinator - Locums
description:
Credentialing, Licensing and Privileging Coordinator:



Assists our Client Hospital CVO/MSOs (Central Verification Office/Medical Staff Office) in the process of getting credentials for our locum candidates to work within their hospital or with their medical group.

Arrange and manage the privileging and credentialing process for all new healthcare providers according to the clients medical staff rules and bylaws. 

Requests applications and works as liaison between hospital and locum physician in getting all documents needed to process the hospital privileging/credentialing application Including: verifying education, training, licensure, certifications, professional experience, references, etc. prior to start of assignment.

Prepare and submit credentialing applications to various healthcare organizations, insurance companies, and regulatory bodies.

Prepopulate applications (Online and Paper) for: health system, hospital and billing applications.

Research points of contact for clinician work history, malpractice coverage, case logs, etc.

Compiles and sends out requests for verifications

Track and follow up on the status of credentialing applications and communicate updates to all involved parties.  Proactively communicate information and updates to Noor Locums team, Client CVO and Locum Physician.

Resolves and appropriately escalates inquiries and concerns

Work on multiple tasks simultaneously

Process/Prioritize tasks and a large amount of documentation in a timely and professional manner

Maintains/Updates: credentialing files, clinician profiles and documents in Noor Locums database (Crelate)

Helps to coordinate EMR training, onboarding and orientation prior to target start date

Privileging



Coordinate the privileging process for new and existing healthcare providers, including reviewing and verifying applications, supporting documentation, and qualifications.

Assist in the development and maintenance of privileging criteria and procedures in accordance with regulatory and accreditation standards.

Prepare privileging recommendations for presentation to the Medical Staff Committee and Governing Body.

Maintain accurate and up-to-date privileging records and documentation.

Monitor and track the expiration of privileges and coordinate the re-privileging process.



Compliance and Documentation



Ensure compliance with all applicable federal, state, and local regulations, as well as accreditation standards related to credentialing and privileging.

Prepare and present reports on credentialing and privileging activities to leadership and regulatory bodies as needed.

Assist in audits and inspections by regulatory and accrediting organizations.



Communication and Coordination



Serve as a liaison between healthcare providers, administrative staff, and external organizations regarding credentialing and privileging matters.

Provide education and support to healthcare providers and staff on credentialing and privileging processes and requirements.

Collaborate with other departments to ensure seamless onboarding and privileging of new providers.



Prior experience with locums hospital credentialing/privileging and enrollment is a must...

title: Payroll Specialist
description:

This role requires a strong understanding of US payroll regulations, compliance, and timelines, ensuring accurate and timely payroll delivery.



Responsibilities:

Process full-cycle US payroll accurately and on time

Ensure accuracy of employee data including wages, deductions, taxes, and benefits

Qualifications:

Proven experience as a Payroll Specialist handling US payroll (remote experience is a plus)

Experience with payroll systems (e.g., ADP, Gusto, Paychex, or similar platforms)

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field is preferred

title: Digital Marketing & Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Job Title: Digital Marketing & Lead Generation Specialist

Company: Orange Door

Job Type: Full-Time (Remote)



About Us

Orange Door is a creative-forward company blending hospitality, design, and property management. We operate two divisions:

Orange Door Spaces (event, production, and creative spaces) and

Orange Door Stays (unique short-term rental properties).

Right now, our biggest priority is getting more people to discover us, learn what we offer, inquire, and start conversations. We’re not getting enough incoming inquiries — and we need someone who can fix that.

We’re looking for a proactive Digital Marketing & Lead Generation Specialist who can own the process of driving new business. If you can get people talking to us, evaluating our services, and increasing overall interest, you’re exactly who we need.



Role Overview

Your mission is simple: get more leads, more conversations, and more interest for both Orange Door Spaces and Orange Door Stays.

How you do it will involve a mix of:

? digital ads

?
 marketing

? outreach

? testing new tech and AI tools

? researching potential audiences

? setting up funnels and workflows

? and anything that gets us in front of more people.

We need someone who can strategize and execute — someone comfortable experimenting, tracking results, and consistently figuring out “what’s working.”



Key Responsibilities

Lead Generation & Demand Creation

-Build and execute strategies that generate new inquiries for our spaces and stays.

-Identify target clients and actively reach out through
, DM, or cold calling (as needed).

-Explore and set up AI-driven lead generation tools, chatbots, or voice agents.

-Develop processes that consistently increase conversations and interest.



Digital Advertising

-Plan, launch, and optimize ads on Google,
, Instagram, and other platforms.

-Test different targeting, ad types, and creative angles to maximize lead volume.

-Analyze ad performance and refine strategies based on data.



 & Outreach Marketing

-Build our first
 marketing campaigns (nurture sequences, newsletters, promos).

-Create outreach templates and send campaigns to potential clients, partners, and businesses.

-Manage follow-ups and track engagement.



Content & Collaboration

-Work with our graphics team to produce high-performing creatives.

-Recommend angles, messaging, and content that will increase conversions and interest.

-Stay updated on trends, tools, and new strategies for lead gen.



Reporting & Optimization

-Track all lead generation channels and report what’s working.

-Suggest new funnels, tools, or workflows that can help scale interest and reach.



Requirements

-3+ years of experience in digital marketing, lead generation, or performance marketing.

-Hands-on experience running Google Ads and social media ads.

-Experience with outbound marketing 
 outreach, cold outreach, etc.).

-Strong understanding of funnels, targeting, and conversion strategies.

-Ability to analyze data and make decisions based on results.

-Excellent communication skills, especially in writing outreach and ad copy.

-A self-starter with the ability to independently test, learn, and adjust.

-Bonus: Experience in hospitality, real estate, events, or short-term rentals.



How to Apply

title: Agent Assistant
description:
Agent Assistant - Ally Logistics



ABOUT ALLY LOGISTICS:

Ally Logistics is a U.S.-based third-party logistics (3PL) company headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Since 2012, we’ve been committed to creating the ultimate freight shipping experience by operating at the optimal intersection of people and technology.



As a full-service 3PL, we specialize in a wide range of freight solutions, including dry van, refrigerated, drayage, straight truck, open deck/flatbed, drop-trailer programs, warehousing, and more. Our diverse service capabilities allow us to support shippers across industries with flexible, reliable, and scalable logistics strategies.

We partner with skilled global talent to support our continued growth and operational excellence, ensuring our customers receive efficient, high-quality service at every step of the supply chain.



ROLE SUMMARY:



The Agent Assistant supports daily transportation operations by building and scheduling TL shipments in the TMS while ensuring timely same-day and next-day freight coverage across multiple equipment types. They will also handle account support by gradually taking on responsibilities such as requesting accessorial charges, and providing customer updates as needed.



Regular Weekly Schedule (40 hours): Monday – Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time with 1-hour unpaid lunch break. 



JOB DUTIES/RESPONSIBILITIES: 

-Build and schedule TL shipments in TMS system, effectively and efficiently

-Manage same-day and next-day freight coverage - including dry van, refrigerated, and other equipment types

-Record and update in and out times in customer TMS systems for Enterprise accounts to support visibility and accuracy

-Dispatch drivers and perform proactive track-and-trace for Enterprise specific loads and lanes

-Extract and communicate critical customer updates to the internal team and, when appropriate

-Handle Account Support: Gradually take on additional responsibilities such as requesting accessorial charges, providing customer updates as needed and spot bidding on new shipments

-Optimize Operational Efficiency: Continuously seek out and implement improvements to streamline operations and enhance service delivery for the assigned account.

-Maintain Customer Relationships: Develop and maintain strong relationships with customers, addressing any concerns or issues promptly to ensure satisfaction.



KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs):

-Build, book and set up tracking for any over the road shipments needed.

-Accurately building White Glove loads as needed.

-Updating customers at all key checkpoints in the shipment lifecycle.

-Actively seeking out additional roles as comfort levels grow.



REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:

-Minimum of 2 years of experience in logistics/3PL industry

-Minimum of 2 years of load booking experience, preferably straight truck & expedite shipments

-Experience with Sylectus preferred

-Strong written and verbal English communication skills

-Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

-Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

-Urgent mentality and strong organization skills



Access to:

-A reliable computer with high-speed internet

-Backup internet source (mobile hotspot or secondary line preferred)

-Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

-Headset

-Professional remote workspace

-Ability to work U.S. business hours (EST)



Experience with:

-Outlook

-Zoom phone

-Slack

-Basic CRM or logistics platform



Additional Requirements

1. Technology & Equipment Requirements

-Reliable high-speed internet and computer

-Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

-Quiet, professional workspace

2. Availability Requirements

-Ability to work U.S. Eastern Time

-Must provide advanced notice for planned time off

-Must maintain consistent communication (Slack responsiveness,
, etc.)

title: Short-Form Military Facts Scriptwriter
description: We run a military/defense facts YouTube channel producing short-form video scripts (60–90 seconds). We need a scriptwriter who can research and write punchy, engaging scripts on military history, weapons, aircraft, and tactics. Scripts follow a strict format: strong hook, 3-point list or escalating facts, and a surprising twist or punchline at the end. Topics include things like "3 most useless weapons ever built," "why the A-10's gun doesn't melt," and "how ejection seats work." You must write in a high-energy, conversational tone — not academic. Accuracy matters, but entertainment comes first. Deliverables are 7-14 scripts per week depending on agreement.

title: Mental Health Intake / Scheduling Specialist
description:
???? Now Hiring: Intake Specialist (Remote)



Healthcare Partners Consulting & Billing is growing, and we are looking for a high-level Intake Specialist to join our team.



This role is the front line of our organization. You are not just answering phones, you are guiding patients, representing providers, and protecting the revenue cycle from the very first interaction.



About this role:

You will be responsible for answering calls, scheduling patients, verifying insurance benefits, and clearly communicating those benefits both verbally and in writing. This is a fast-paced environment where you will need to shift between providers, systems, and responsibilities throughout the day.



Responsibilities include:



Answering inbound calls with professionalism and confidence

Scheduling patients accurately and efficiently

Verifying insurance benefits and eligibility

Explaining benefits clearly to patients (copays, deductibles, coinsurance)

Sending written benefit summaries via

title: Proposal Writer – EHS Compliance Services
description:
***Please submit your application through the following link: 
=



About CDMS 



CDMS (Chemical Data Management Systems) is a California-based Environmental Health & Safety consulting firm with over 35 years of experience helping industrial facilities comply with federal, state, and local regulations. With offices in Dublin and Long Beach, we serve hundreds of manufacturing, distribution, and other industrial clients throughout California, providing comprehensive EHS compliance services including Air Quality permitting, Hazardous Materials management, Storm Water compliance, Wastewater management, and OSHA safety support. 



The Role 



We're seeking a Proposal Writer with 2-5 years of environmental or safety compliance experience to join our remote team. This role combines technical knowledge with strong writing skills to create compelling proposals for California businesses. You'll handle routine client conversations and proposal development independently, while collaborating with senior consultants on complex projects and long-term contracts. 



This is a technical role that requires understanding environmental compliance and California regulations. You'll have direct client interactions for routine proposals—answering questions, clarifying scope, and presenting services. For larger opportunities and complex regulatory projects, you'll work alongside our senior sales team to develop comprehensive proposals. Success requires technical competence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build client relationships through clear, professional interactions. 



Work Schedule & Compensation 



Full-time: 8 hours/day, 40 hours/week 



Work shift: Pacific Standard Time (PST) 



Benefits: 10 days PTO + 5 sick days annually 



What You'll Do 



Conduct client conversations for routine proposals including discovery calls, scope clarification, and follow-up discussions 



Write clear, technically accurate proposals for CDMS services including air quality permitting, hazardous materials management, stormwater compliance, and safety consulting 



Handle routine client inquiries and proposal requests independently from initial contact through submission 



Collaborate with senior sales consultants on complex proposals, long-term contracts, and strategic client opportunities 



Research California environmental regulations (EPA, DTSC, CUPAs, Water Boards, Air Districts) to support accurate proposal content 



Draft professional client communications including
s, follow-up letters, and service agreements 



Present CDMS services and capabilities to prospective clients during routine sales conversations 



Coordinate with technical staff to gather project details, timelines, and pricing information for proposals 



Maintain proposal templates and standard language library for efficient proposal development 



Track proposal submissions, follow up on pending opportunities, and manage client communication timeline 



Update and maintain client database and proposal tracking systems 



Learn California compliance requirements and CDMS service offerings to improve proposal quality and client conversations over time 



What You Bring 



2-5 years of experience in environmental consulting, safety compliance, or EHS operations 



Bachelor's degree in Environmental Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Environmental Science, Safety Management, or related technical field (required) 



Technical background in environmental or safety compliance (experience with permits, audits, or regulatory documentation) 



Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English (professional business level required) 



Strong ability to understand and explain technical regulatory concepts to clients 



Experience writing technical proposals, reports, or regulatory documentation 



Comfortable conducting client conversations and answering technical questions 



Exceptional attention to detail and ability to produce accurate, professional documents 



Ability to work independently on routine proposals while knowing when to involve senior team 



Knowledge of environmental regulations (California regulations a plus) 



Proficiency with Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) 



Experience working with US-based clients highly valued 



Self-motivated with strong organizational and time management skills 



Able to manage multiple proposal deadlines and client conversations simultaneously 



Why Work With Us 



Opportunity to develop expertise in California environmental compliance while building your technical writing career 



Work directly with experienced EHS consultants and learn from senior tea
mbers 



Hybrid remote work arrangement with flexible scheduling within PST business hours 



Collegial, supportive team environment that values clear communication and continuous learning 



Make meaningful contributions that help California companies protect their employees and the environment 



Professional development opportunities to grow your technical knowledge and writing skills 



CDMS is committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer. 



How to Apply 



***Please submit your application through the following link:

title: Digital Marketing & Content Specialist
description:
About CDMS 



CDMS is a B2B Environmental, Health & Safety (EHS) services company. We work directly with manufacturing and industrial clients, helping them stay compliant, safe, and operationally sound. We have a strong technical team and a clear brand — now we need someone to take that expertise and turn it into a consistent, credible online presence. 



The Role 



This is a hands-on execution role — not a management or strategy position. You will own our digital marketing output day-to-day: writing, publishing, optimizing, and engaging. You will learn our voice, our clients, and our industry, and use that knowledge to build our presence on LinkedIn and in search. 



You will work closely with our leadership team, who will feed you intel from client conversations. Your job is to turn that raw material into polished content that sounds like us. 



What You'll Do 



SEO 



Conduct a full SEO audit using Ahrefs and implement on-page optimizations 



Perform ongoing keyword research and monitor rankings 



Identify content gaps and recommend topics based on search demand



Content & Ghostwriting 



Write blog posts, LinkedIn articles, and newsletters in the voice of our leadership team 



Turn client conversations and project outcomes (fed to you by our team) into compelling case studies 



Curate RSS feeds from EHS, manufacturing, and safety industry sources and develop timely, opinionated content based on those topics 



Maintain a consistent editorial calendar across all channels 



LinkedIn Management 



Manage our leadership team's LinkedIn presence — posting, commenting, and connecting on their behalf 



Engage daily with content from existing clients and prospects in the EHS and manufacturing space 



Grow our LinkedIn network through targeted, strategic outreach 



Collateral & Internal Branding 



Apply our existing brand guidelines to materials provided by our technical team — one pagers, posters, and laminated sheets for client sites 



Coordinate with our onsite admin assistant for printing/lamination and with the EHS team for client delivery 



Keep all materials current and on-brand 



What We're Looking For 



Strong B2B copywriting skills — you write clearly, professionally, and without fluff 



Hands-on SEO experience with Ahrefs or SEMrush (not just conceptual knowledge) 



Proven experience managing Blog Posts and LinkedIn presence or ghostwriting for a B2B executive or company 



Ability to learn a technical industry quickly and write about it credibly 



Experience with content monitoring tools 



Canva or basic design skills to apply brand templates to documents 



Self-directed and organized — you manage your own priorities and deadlines 



Proficient in WordPress or similar CMS 



Excellent written English 



Nice to Have 



Familiarity with EHS, safety, or manufacturing industries 



Experience with newsletter platforms (Active Campaign, or similar) 



How to Apply

Please submit your application through the following link: 
= and ensure you complete the two required Predictive Index assessments for this position.

title: URGENT  Video Editor / Creator with very light Phone Intake - (GoHighLevel experience helpful)
description:
About the 
 Water Prowash



We are looking for a highly skilled, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to join our team. 

This is a dual-focus role in a relaxed atmosphere. You will be the creative engine behind our social media and YouTube presence (Video/SEO/AEO) and the first point of contact for our customers (Voice) for 1-10 calls a day.   We are a USA based home service company.  We offer house washing, power washing, and paver patio restoration.  Very active type videos.  



Key Responsibilities:   

Our main  hiring role is for EDITING RAW VIDEO & POSTS.  We are not looking for a GHL specialists admin to improve work flow or a phone sales person. 



PRIMARY ROLE

Content Creation: Edit raw footage into high-quality videos & posts for YouTube, Insta,
, TikTok etc.  Researching keywords, "people also ask" or similar, researching what ai and voice search is looking for to help rank our media and map pack. SEO, AEO & Marketing: Research and apply effective keywords, titles, transcripts and descriptions to all video uploads to maximize reach. 

You will be asked to go back to previous media and update seo/aeo, transcripts etc.

This is our YouTube link:  



SECENDARY ROLE

  Phone & CRM: Answer incoming calls with a clear, neutral accent. You will be responsible for answering incoming calls ,filling out website intake forms  as seen here: 
, and updating our CRM.  Customer call volume varies from 1-10 calls a day or none will come in.  Many customers fill out our website form themselves instead of calling.



3) Basic GoHighLevel Management: 

Upload content and manage the Social Planner.

Enter customer or prospect information from incoming calls and website forms.



We will work together to learn GHL to ensure leads are moving through our GHL workflows and automations.  We have 2 software paid programs to help us learn more. This is not a high priority at the 
nt. No experience necessary at this time but willing to learn.



4) Forward all the intake calls and lead form information to the employer thru WhatsApp at the end of the day for a summary.



5) You will need to login/logout with the employer everyday along with what is being worked on, what was completed and what the employer needs to do.  You may create a form to send on WhatsApp.



6) We will discuss or the employer may provide a list of tasks for each day.   The employer may ask you to stop your current task to do another then you may return to the current task after the immediate task has been completed.  Tasks must be flexible.



7) Some light admin work may be asked of you.  We may discuss at the interview.



Required Qualifications

Voice Excellence: You must have a neutral accent with professional, clear English fluency. 

Previous BPO or phone-handling experience is a major plus but not mandatory.



Technical Editing: Advanced proficiency in video editing software . Must be able to work with raw footage.



Some GHL Experience::

1) Direct experience using GoHighLevel (CRM  and Social Planner) is highly preferred but not mandatory. 

2) Transferring phone lines from GHL..



Learning  social media, keywords SEO/AEO and how to use keywords/answer questions to drive traffic.



Hardware: A reliable PC/Mac capable of video rendering, a noise-canceling headset, and a stable, high-speed wired internet connection, external hard drive.  Cell phone in case of power outage for communication to employer.   All in excellent working order.  Google drive. 



************************************************************************************************* 

HOW TO APPLY  ( Follow These Steps and answer the questions-you may copy and paste the question then answer)

To be considered for this position, please reply with the following:



1)  A link to your Video Portfolio (Show us your best edits from raw footage).  

The owner takes many photos and videos for you to produce high converting video & posts on social media including YouTube.



2) A 60-second or more voice recording introducing yourself and describing your experience with GoHighLevel, Intake phone customer service and how you may have helped another employer.

 ** Provide a recording in the
 or with a link.



3) Your hardware specs (RAM, Processor, backup battery, external hard drive, and screenshot of your Internet Speed).  

     Do you have rank tracking software? Not mandatory but useful.



3a) Do you have a way to keep working on a project if the employer asks you to record a webinar at the same time?



3b)  What editing software do you utilize?  

Are you willing to learn other editing software programs? 

Are you willing to learn ai  programs?  We have a paid software program to help us learn.



3c) "How would you format a video transcript so that an AI like ChatGPT , Perplexity or voice search so they can find our power washing services easily?"



4) How often do you experience power outages?  

What would you do if this occurs during working hours?



5) Much employer communication is through WhatsApp.  Do you have an account and currently use it?



6) Do you have a Google drive?  

Are you proficient in Google drive/docs? 

How much space do you have on your drive? 

The employer utilizes their drive sparingly.  We use the drive to share photo/video approvals and other admin tasks.  You will be asked to give employer ownership to any new folder.



7) Explain your proficiency with Google sheets/docs.  Not mandatory but you may complete minor admin duties.



This position is proactive on many occasions especially in the summer months.  The owner may not have immediate availability to answer questions, but will return any questions as quickly as possible. 

Winter months (October - February) the owner has more availability, one on one or quicker response time.  

Summer months (Mid March- mid October) has less due to working in the business./slower response time



Pay is every two weeks.  You will need to sign up for Payoneer. 

Onlinejobs offers you a bonus if you sign up thru their site.

Please state your requested hourly salary in USD.



Hours: 8a.m. - 4:300/5:00 p.m. EST Monday-Friday summer hours (you will be answering the phone during business open hours)

Winter hours are more flexible as we do not provide home service business during cold weather.



Seasonal business:  You will work full time March-October with over time availability.  Winter hours November through February you will have part time hours and/or you may find another job during that time.  You will be asked to come back for the following season with a returning bonus.



Bonuses: 

Return following year bonus, contact customers and ask for reviews (if a review is given on a platform you receive a $5 bonus), outstanding eye catching videos, flexible if time off is needed occasionally with prior notification (Philippine holiday, family) and more.



We thank you for your interest in working with Clear Water Prowash.  Please feel free to ask any questions in your reply. This is a low key supportive environment, but fast paced at times.

title: Mental Health Billing Specialist
description:
???? Now Hiring: Mental Health Billing Specialist (Remote)



Healthcare Partners Consulting & Billing is seeking an experienced Mental Health Billing Specialist to join our team.



This is not a “submit claims and move on” position. We are looking for someone who understands the full revenue cycle and takes responsibility for getting providers paid accurately and timely.



If you are used to pushing claims and waiting, this is not the role for you.



About this role:

You will be responsible for managing claims from submission through payment, identifying issues, and resolving them. This includes working denials, following up with payers, and ensuring claims are processed correctly from the start.



Responsibilities include:



Submitting clean claims for mental health services

Reviewing sessions to ensure billing accuracy before submission

Following up on unpaid and underpaid claims

Working denials and rejections with urgency and accuracy

Communicating with insurance companies and documenting reference numbers

Identifying patterns and reporting issues that impact revenue

Maintaining accurate notes and documentation in all systems



Requirements:



Minimum 2 years of mental health billing experience

Strong understanding of the full revenue cycle, not just claim submission

Experience working with insurance companies and handling denials

Ability to read and interpret EOBs and payer responses

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to manage multiple providers and priorities at once



Our expectation:

Submitting claims is the lowest level of this role. The value is in identifying problems, preventing denials, and getting claims paid.



We expect our team to understand payer behavior, stay current, and embrace AI and technology to improve efficiency. If you are not willing to learn and adapt, this will not be a fit.



Schedule:

title: Construction CAD Technician/Project Engineer
description:
PLEASE READ & FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS:

If you're ready to take the next step in your construction career, we want to hear from you! To apply, don’t forget to follow these steps:

1.
 with 'HIRE ME - CAD Technician/Project Engineer/Estimator' in the subject line and send to " 

2. Attach your updated Resume/CV in PDF format, detailing your work history.

3. Include a portfolio showcasing your work.

4. Record a one-minute Intro Video addressed to WBC, highlighting your background, skills, and relevant experiences.

5. Provide contact information for 2 professional references, including their Full Names, Job Positions, Relationships, working Philippine contact numbers, Date and Time of Availability.



Job Description:

As a Construction CAD Design Technician/Project Engineer, you will play a vital role in ensuring the smooth operation of our construction projects by managing the procurement process. Your responsibilities will include:



1. Creating Submittal Logs: Develop and maintain comprehensive submittal logs to track the submission and approval of all project-related documents.

2. Creating Work Orders: Generate accurate and detailed work orders for subcontractors and suppliers, ensuring all necessary information is included.

3. Creating RFI Logs: Maintain a detailed Request for Information (RFI) log, ensuring all queries and responses are accurately recorded and communicated.

4. Creating accurate Cabinet and Shop Drawings

5. Vendor Management: Identify, evaluate, and manage relationships with suppliers and subcontractors to ensure the timely delivery of high-quality materials and services.

6. Cost Management: Monitor and control project costs by negotiating favorable terms with suppliers, managing budgets, and ensuring cost-effective procurement practices.

7. Inventory Management: Oversee the inventory of construction materials and equipment, ensuring adequate stock levels and minimizing waste.

8. Compliance and Documentation: Ensure all procurement activities comply with relevant regulations and standards. Maintain accurate and up-to-date procurement records and documentation.

9. Collaboration: Work closely with project managers, site superintendents, engineers, and other tea
mbers to align procurement activities with project timelines and requirements.

10. Continuous Improvement: Identify opportunities to improve procurement processes and implement best practices to enhance efficiency and effectiveness.

11. Highly efficient at taking notes during meeting.



Requirements:

- A bachelor’s degree in engineering, architecture, supply chain management, or a similar field is preferred.

- Minimum of 4 years experience in the construction industry.

- Proven experience in construction coordination or a related role.

- Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy to ensure there are no mistakes in procurement activities.

- Strong organizational and time-management skills.

- Excellent negotiation and communication skills. Must be fluent in English (verbal and written).

- Proficiency in procurement software and tools.

- In-depth knowledge of construction materials, equipment, and industry standards.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.



Please be advised that only candidates who have submitted the specified requirements will be considered in this position.

title: Short-Form Video Editor for Home Services Brand
description:
We are looking for a skilled Video Editor to help us create high-quality content for our home service brands.



We are a painting, flooring, and roofing company, and the main focus of this role is turning raw footage into short-form content for platforms like Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and
. At the same time, we would also like someone who can help with some long-form editing when needed.



We want to build strong digital content around our business, our projects, and our team. This will include things like:

-Podcast clips

-Talking-head videos

-Educational content

-Project-site videos

-Before-and-after content

-Branding and company growth content



For example, if we record a podcast or longer video, we want you to turn it into as many strong short clips as possible, while also being able to help edit full-length videos when needed.



We like content that is clean, engaging, and educational, similar to the style of business content creators like Mike Andes. We want videos that hold attention, teach something useful, and help build our brand over time.



What you’ll be doing:

-Edit raw footage into short-form content for social media

-Turn long-form videos, podcasts, and interviews into multiple clips

-Help edit some full-length videos for YouTube or other platforms

-Add captions, hooks, transitions, zooms, music, and graphics when needed

-Find the best 
nts that will perform well online

-Organize footage and keep editing projects clean and efficient

-Follow our brand style while also bringing creative ideas



What we are looking for:

-Strong short-form editing skills

-Ability to also handle some long-form content

-Understands pacing, hooks, retention, and social media editing

-Can turn one long video into many strong short clips

-Good English communication

-Reliable and responsive

-Strong attention to detail

-Able to meet deadlines consistently



Big bonus if you have experience with:

-Podcasts

-YouTube content

-Home service companies

-Painting, roofing, flooring, construction, remodeling, or real estate content

-Local service business marketing

-Educational or personal-brand style content



To apply, please send:

-Your best 3 to 5 editing samples

-At least 1 example where you turned a longer video or podcast into short clips

-Any long-form examples you have

-Any examples you have for home services, contractors, real estate, or similar businesses

-The software you use

-Your hourly rate

-Your weekly availability



Please start your application with the words: SHORT FORM EDITOR so we know you read the full post.



We are looking for someone long-term if it is the right fit.
